changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.comment: Add spell-metadata + engloc/rusloc columns to user-facing reference tables

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS class_spell_slots ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), class_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES character_classes(id), level integer NOT NULL, caster_type text NOT NULL, cantrips_known integer, spells_known integer, slots_1 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_2 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_3 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_4 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_5 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_6 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_7 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_8 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, slots_9 integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT uq_class_spell_slots_class_level UNIQUE (class_id, level) )

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subclass_level_rewards ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), subclass_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES subclasses(id), required_level integer NOT NULL, reward_type text NOT NULL, reward_id uuid NOT NULL, is_choice boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false )

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Athletics', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Strength'), 'Athletics', 'Атлетика' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Athletics')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Acrobatics', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), 'Acrobatics', 'Акробатика' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Acrobatics')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sleight of Hand', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), 'Sleight of Hand', 'Ловкость рук' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Sleight of Hand')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Stealth', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), 'Stealth', 'Скрытность' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Stealth')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Arcana', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), 'Arcana', 'Магия' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Arcana')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'History', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), 'History', 'История' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'History')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Investigation', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), 'Investigation', 'Анализ' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Investigation')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Nature', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), 'Nature', 'Природа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Nature')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Religion', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), 'Religion', 'Религия' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Religion')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Animal Handling', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), 'Animal Handling', 'Уход за животными' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Animal Handling')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Insight', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), 'Insight', 'Проницательность' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Insight')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Medicine', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), 'Medicine', 'Медицина' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Medicine')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Perception', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), 'Perception', 'Внимательность' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Perception')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Survival', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), 'Survival', 'Выживание' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Survival')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Deception', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), 'Deception', 'Обман' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Deception')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Intimidation', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), 'Intimidation', 'Запугивание' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Intimidation')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Performance', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), 'Performance', 'Выступление' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Performance')

INSERT INTO proficiency_skills (id, name, governing_stat_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Persuasion', (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), 'Persuasion', 'Убеждение' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM proficiency_skills WHERE name = 'Persuasion')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Copper Pieces', 100.0, TRUE, NULL, 'Copper Pieces', 'Медные монеты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM currency_types WHERE name = 'Copper Pieces')

INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Silver Pieces', 10.0, TRUE, NULL, 'Silver Pieces', 'Серебряные монеты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM currency_types WHERE name = 'Silver Pieces')

INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Electrum Pieces', 2.0, TRUE, NULL, 'Electrum Pieces', 'Электрумовые монеты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM currency_types WHERE name = 'Electrum Pieces')

INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Gold Pieces', 1.0, TRUE, NULL, 'Gold Pieces', 'Золотые монеты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM currency_types WHERE name = 'Gold Pieces')

INSERT INTO currency_types (id, name, exchange_rate_to_gold, is_default, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Platinum Pieces', 0.1, TRUE, NULL, 'Platinum Pieces', 'Платиновые монеты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM currency_types WHERE name = 'Platinum Pieces')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Blinded', 'Can''t see; auto-fails sight checks; attacks against have advantage, its attacks have disadvantage.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Blinded', 'Ослеплён', 'Can''t see; auto-fails sight checks; attacks against have advantage, its attacks have disadvantage.', 'Не видит, автопровал проверок на зрение; атаки по нему с преимуществом, его атаки с помехой.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Blinded')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Charmed', 'Can''t attack the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks against it.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Charmed', 'Очарован', 'Can''t attack the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks against it.', 'Не может атаковать очаровавшего; у того преимущество на социальные проверки против него.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Charmed')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Deafened', 'Can''t hear; auto-fails hearing checks.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Deafened', 'Оглохший', 'Can''t hear; auto-fails hearing checks.', 'Не слышит, автопровал проверок на слух.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Deafened')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Frightened', 'Disadvantage on checks/attacks while source is in sight; can''t willingly move closer.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Frightened', 'Испуган', 'Disadvantage on checks/attacks while source is in sight; can''t willingly move closer.', 'Помеха на проверки и атаки, пока источник в поле зрения; не может приближаться к нему.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Frightened')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Grappled', 'Speed becomes 0; ends if grappler is incapacitated or moved away.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Grappled', 'Схвачен', 'Speed becomes 0; ends if grappler is incapacitated or moved away.', 'Скорость 0; заканчивается, если схвативший недееспособен или удалён.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Grappled')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Incapacitated', 'Can''t take actions or reactions.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Incapacitated', 'Недееспособен', 'Can''t take actions or reactions.', 'Не может совершать действия и реакции.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Incapacitated')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Invisible', 'Can''t be seen without aid; attacks against have disadvantage, its attacks have advantage.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, TRUE, NULL, 'Invisible', 'Невидимый', 'Can''t be seen without aid; attacks against have disadvantage, its attacks have advantage.', 'Не виден без помощи; атаки по нему с помехой, его атаки с преимуществом.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Invisible')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Paralyzed', 'Incapacitated, can''t move/speak; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Paralyzed', 'Парализован', 'Incapacitated, can''t move/speak; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.', 'Недееспособен, не двигается и не говорит; автопровал спасбросков Сил/Лов; попадания в упор — криты.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Paralyzed')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Petrified', 'Turned to solid substance; incapacitated, resists all damage, immune to poison/disease.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Petrified', 'Окаменевший', 'Turned to solid substance; incapacitated, resists all damage, immune to poison/disease.', 'Превращён в твёрдое вещество; недееспособен, сопротивление всему урону, иммунитет к яду и болезням.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Petrified')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Poisoned', 'Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Poisoned', 'Отравлен', 'Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.', 'Помеха на броски атаки и проверки характеристик.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Poisoned')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Prone', 'Can only crawl; disadvantage on attacks; melee against has advantage, ranged disadvantage.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Prone', 'Сбит с ног', 'Can only crawl; disadvantage on attacks; melee against has advantage, ranged disadvantage.', 'Может только ползти; помеха на атаки; ближние атаки по нему с преимуществом, дальние с помехой.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Prone')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Restrained', 'Speed 0; attacks against have advantage, its attacks disadvantage; disadvantage on DEX saves.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Restrained', 'Опутан', 'Speed 0; attacks against have advantage, its attacks disadvantage; disadvantage on DEX saves.', 'Скорость 0; атаки по нему с преимуществом, его атаки с помехой; помеха на спасброски Ловкости.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Restrained')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Stunned', 'Incapacitated, can''t move, speaks falteringly; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits have advantage.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Stunned', 'Ошеломлён', 'Incapacitated, can''t move, speaks falteringly; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits have advantage.', 'Недееспособен, не двигается, говорит запинаясь; автопровал спасбросков Сил/Лов; атаки по нему с преимуществом.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Stunned')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Unconscious', 'Incapacitated, prone, drops everything; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Unconscious', 'Без сознания', 'Incapacitated, prone, drops everything; auto-fails STR/DEX saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.', 'Недееспособен, лежит ничком, всё роняет; автопровал спасбросков Сил/Лов; попадания в упор — криты.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Unconscious')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Exhaustion', 'Six cumulative levels of increasing penalties; level 6 is death. Reduced by 1 per long rest.', 'CONDITION', NULL, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, 'Exhaustion', 'Истощение', 'Six cumulative levels of increasing penalties; level 6 is death. Reduced by 1 per long rest.', 'Шесть нарастающих уровней штрафов; 6-й уровень — смерть. Снижается на 1 за продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Exhaustion')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Raging', 'Advantage on STR checks/saves, melee STR damage bonus, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing.', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, NULL, 10, TRUE, NULL, 'Raging', 'Ярость', 'Advantage on STR checks/saves, melee STR damage bonus, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing.', 'Преимущество на проверки/спасброски Силы, бонус к урону ближним оружием, сопротивление дробящему/колющему/рубящему.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Raging')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bless', 'Add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, NULL, 10, TRUE, NULL, 'Bless', 'Благословение', 'Add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.', 'Добавляет 1d4 к броскам атаки и спасброскам.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Bless')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bane', 'Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, NULL, 10, FALSE, NULL, 'Bane', 'Проклятие', 'Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.', 'Вычитает 1d4 из бросков атаки и спасбросков.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Bane')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bardic Inspiration', 'Add an inspiration die to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, NULL, NULL, TRUE, NULL, 'Bardic Inspiration', 'Вдохновение барда', 'Add an inspiration die to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.', 'Добавляет кость вдохновения к одной проверке, атаке или спасброску.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shield of Faith', '+2 bonus to AC for the duration.', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, 2, 100, TRUE, NULL, 'Shield of Faith', 'Щит веры', '+2 bonus to AC for the duration.', '+2 к КД на время действия.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Shield of Faith')

INSERT INTO buffs_debuffs (id, name, description, effect_type, target_stat_id, modifier_value, duration_rounds, is_buff, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+1 AC and Saves', '+1 bonus to AC and to all saving throws (e.g. Ring of Protection).', 'STAT_MODIFIER', NULL, 1, NULL, TRUE, NULL, '+1 AC and Saves', '+1 к КД и спасброскам', '+1 bonus to AC and to all saving throws (e.g. Ring of Protection).', '+1 к КД и ко всем спасброскам (например, Кольцо защиты).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = '+1 AC and Saves')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Alert', '+5 initiative; can''t be surprised while conscious; unseen attackers gain no advantage against you.', NULL, NULL, 'Alert', 'Бдительный', '+5 initiative; can''t be surprised while conscious; unseen attackers gain no advantage against you.', '+5 к инициативе; вас нельзя застать врасплох в сознании; невидимые атакующие не получают преимущества против вас.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Alert')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Athlete', '+1 STR or DEX; stand from prone with 5 ft; climb at full speed; better running jumps.', NULL, NULL, 'Athlete', 'Атлет', '+1 STR or DEX; stand from prone with 5 ft; climb at full speed; better running jumps.', '+1 Сил или Лов; встаёте из положения лёжа за 5 футов; лазаете на полной скорости; лучше прыжки с разбега.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Athlete')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Actor', '+1 CHA; advantage on Deception/Performance when impersonating; mimic speech and sounds.', NULL, NULL, 'Actor', 'Актёр', '+1 CHA; advantage on Deception/Performance when impersonating; mimic speech and sounds.', '+1 Хар; преимущество на Обман/Выступление при выдаче себя за другого; имитация речи и звуков.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Actor')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Charger', 'After a dash, make one melee attack or shove with a +5 damage bonus as a bonus action.', NULL, NULL, 'Charger', 'Бросок в атаку', 'After a dash, make one melee attack or shove with a +5 damage bonus as a bonus action.', 'После рывка — одна ближняя атака или толчок с бонусом +5 к урону бонусным действием.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Charger')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Crossbow Expert', 'Ignore loading; no disadvantage in melee with ranged; bonus-action hand-crossbow shot.', NULL, NULL, 'Crossbow Expert', 'Знаток арбалета', 'Ignore loading; no disadvantage in melee with ranged; bonus-action hand-crossbow shot.', 'Игнорируете перезарядку; нет помехи в ближнем бою с дальним оружием; бонусный выстрел из ручного арбалета.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Crossbow Expert')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Defensive Duelist', 'Use reaction to add proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack.', 'Dexterity 13 or higher', NULL, 'Defensive Duelist', 'Дуэлянт-защитник', 'Use reaction to add proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack.', 'Реакцией добавляете бонус мастерства к КД против одной ближней атаки.', 'Dexterity 13 or higher', 'Ловкость 13 или выше' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Defensive Duelist')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dual Wielder', '+1 AC while dual-wielding; use non-light weapons; draw two weapons at once.', NULL, NULL, 'Dual Wielder', 'Боец двумя оружиями', '+1 AC while dual-wielding; use non-light weapons; draw two weapons at once.', '+1 к КД при бое двумя оружиями; можно нелёгкое оружие; обнажаете два оружия разом.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Dual Wielder')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dungeon Delver', 'Advantage to detect secret doors/traps; resistance to trap damage; search at full speed.', NULL, NULL, 'Dungeon Delver', 'Исследователь подземелий', 'Advantage to detect secret doors/traps; resistance to trap damage; search at full speed.', 'Преимущество на поиск тайных дверей/ловушек; сопротивление урону ловушек; поиск на полной скорости.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Dungeon Delver')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Durable', '+1 CON; minimum HP regained on a Hit Die equals twice your CON modifier.', NULL, NULL, 'Durable', 'Выносливый', '+1 CON; minimum HP regained on a Hit Die equals twice your CON modifier.', '+1 Тел; минимум хитов на Кости Хитов равен удвоенному модификатору Телосложения.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Durable')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Elemental Adept', 'Spells of one element ignore resistance and treat 1s on damage dice as 2s.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', NULL, 'Elemental Adept', 'Знаток стихий', 'Spells of one element ignore resistance and treat 1s on damage dice as 2s.', 'Заклинания одной стихии игнорируют сопротивление и считают 1 на костях урона за 2.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', 'способность накладывать хотя бы одно заклинание' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Elemental Adept')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Grappler', 'Advantage on attacks vs creatures you grapple; can restrain a grappled creature.', 'Strength 13 or higher', NULL, 'Grappler', 'Борец', 'Advantage on attacks vs creatures you grapple; can restrain a grappled creature.', 'Преимущество на атаки по схваченным существам; можно опутывать схваченное существо.', 'Strength 13 or higher', 'Сила 13 или выше' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Grappler')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Great Weapon Master', 'Bonus-action attack on crit/kill; take -5 to hit for +10 damage with heavy weapons.', NULL, NULL, 'Great Weapon Master', 'Мастер большого оружия', 'Bonus-action attack on crit/kill; take -5 to hit for +10 damage with heavy weapons.', 'Бонусная атака при крите/убийстве; −5 к попаданию ради +10 к урону тяжёлым оружием.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Great Weapon Master')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Healer', 'Stabilize and heal 1 HP; use a healer''s kit to restore 1d6+4+Hit Dice hit points.', NULL, NULL, 'Healer', 'Лекарь', 'Stabilize and heal 1 HP; use a healer''s kit to restore 1d6+4+Hit Dice hit points.', 'Стабилизация и +1 хит; набором лекаря восстанавливаете 1d6+4+Кости Хитов хитов.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Healer')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Heavily Armored', '+1 STR; gain proficiency with heavy armor.', 'proficiency with medium armor', NULL, 'Heavily Armored', 'Тяжелобронированный', '+1 STR; gain proficiency with heavy armor.', '+1 Сил; владение тяжёлыми доспехами.', 'proficiency with medium armor', 'владение средними доспехами' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Heavily Armored')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Heavy Armor Master', '+1 STR; reduce nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage by 3.', 'proficiency with heavy armor', NULL, 'Heavy Armor Master', 'Мастер тяжёлых доспехов', '+1 STR; reduce nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage by 3.', '+1 Сил; снижаете немагический дробящий/колющий/рубящий урон на 3.', 'proficiency with heavy armor', 'владение тяжёлыми доспехами' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Heavy Armor Master')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Inspiring Leader', 'Spend 10 minutes to grant up to six allies temporary HP equal to your level + CHA mod.', 'Charisma 13 or higher', NULL, 'Inspiring Leader', 'Вдохновляющий лидер', 'Spend 10 minutes to grant up to six allies temporary HP equal to your level + CHA mod.', '10 минут речи дают до шести союзникам временные хиты, равные вашему уровню + мод. Харизмы.', 'Charisma 13 or higher', 'Харизма 13 или выше' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Inspiring Leader')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Keen Mind', '+1 INT; always know north and time until sunrise/sunset; perfect month-long recall.', NULL, NULL, 'Keen Mind', 'Острый ум', '+1 INT; always know north and time until sunrise/sunset; perfect month-long recall.', '+1 Инт; всегда знаете север и время до рассвета/заката; точная память на месяц назад.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Keen Mind')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Lightly Armored', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with light armor.', NULL, NULL, 'Lightly Armored', 'Легкобронированный', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with light armor.', '+1 Сил или Лов; владение лёгкими доспехами.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Lightly Armored')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Linguist', '+1 INT; learn three languages; create written ciphers others can''t easily decode.', NULL, NULL, 'Linguist', 'Лингвист', '+1 INT; learn three languages; create written ciphers others can''t easily decode.', '+1 Инт; изучаете три языка; создаёте письменные шифры, которые трудно взломать.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Linguist')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Lucky', 'Three luck points per long rest to reroll an attack, check, save, or an attack against you.', NULL, NULL, 'Lucky', 'Удачливый', 'Three luck points per long rest to reroll an attack, check, save, or an attack against you.', 'Три очка удачи за продолжительный отдых для переброса атаки, проверки, спасброска или атаки по вам.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Lucky')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Mage Slayer', 'Reaction attack vs adjacent casters; impose disadvantage on their concentration saves.', NULL, NULL, 'Mage Slayer', 'Убийца магов', 'Reaction attack vs adjacent casters; impose disadvantage on their concentration saves.', 'Реакция-атака по соседним заклинателям; помеха на их спасброски концентрации.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Mage Slayer')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Magic Initiate', 'Learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a chosen class''s list.', NULL, NULL, 'Magic Initiate', 'Посвящённый в магию', 'Learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a chosen class''s list.', 'Изучаете два заговора и одно заклинание 1-го круга из списка выбранного класса.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Magic Initiate')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Martial Adept', 'Learn two Battle Master maneuvers and gain one d6 superiority die.', NULL, NULL, 'Martial Adept', 'Боевой адепт', 'Learn two Battle Master maneuvers and gain one d6 superiority die.', 'Изучаете два приёма Мастера боя и получаете одну кость превосходства d6.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Martial Adept')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Medium Armor Master', 'Medium armor no longer caps DEX at +2 and doesn''t hamper Stealth.', 'proficiency with medium armor', NULL, 'Medium Armor Master', 'Мастер средних доспехов', 'Medium armor no longer caps DEX at +2 and doesn''t hamper Stealth.', 'Средний доспех не ограничивает Лов до +2 и не мешает Скрытности.', 'proficiency with medium armor', 'владение средними доспехами' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Medium Armor Master')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Mobile', '+10 ft speed; dashing ignores difficult terrain; melee attacks avoid opportunity attacks from that target.', NULL, NULL, 'Mobile', 'Подвижный', '+10 ft speed; dashing ignores difficult terrain; melee attacks avoid opportunity attacks from that target.', '+10 футов скорости; рывок игнорирует труднопроходимую местность; ближняя атака избегает провоцированной атаки от цели.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Mobile')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Moderately Armored', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.', 'proficiency with light armor', NULL, 'Moderately Armored', 'Среднебронированный', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.', '+1 Сил или Лов; владение средними доспехами и щитами.', 'proficiency with light armor', 'владение лёгкими доспехами' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Moderately Armored')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Mounted Combatant', 'Advantage vs unmounted smaller foes; redirect attacks from mount to self; mount evades.', NULL, NULL, 'Mounted Combatant', 'Конный боец', 'Advantage vs unmounted smaller foes; redirect attacks from mount to self; mount evades.', 'Преимущество против меньших пеших врагов; переводите атаки со скакуна на себя; скакун уклоняется.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Mounted Combatant')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Observant', '+1 INT or WIS; read lips; +5 to passive Perception and Investigation.', NULL, NULL, 'Observant', 'Наблюдательный', '+1 INT or WIS; read lips; +5 to passive Perception and Investigation.', '+1 Инт или Мдр; читаете по губам; +5 к пассивной Внимательности и Анализу.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Observant')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Polearm Master', 'Bonus-action butt-end attack; opportunity attack when foes enter your reach with reach weapons.', NULL, NULL, 'Polearm Master', 'Мастер древкового оружия', 'Bonus-action butt-end attack; opportunity attack when foes enter your reach with reach weapons.', 'Бонусная атака тупым концом; провоцированная атака, когда враг входит в досягаемость оружия с досягаемостью.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Polearm Master')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Resilient', '+1 to one ability and gain saving-throw proficiency in that ability.', NULL, NULL, 'Resilient', 'Устойчивый', '+1 to one ability and gain saving-throw proficiency in that ability.', '+1 к одной характеристике и владение спасбросками этой характеристики.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Resilient')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ritual Caster', 'Gain a ritual book from one class and cast its rituals.', 'Intelligence or Wisdom 13 or higher', NULL, 'Ritual Caster', 'Ритуальный заклинатель', 'Gain a ritual book from one class and cast its rituals.', 'Получаете книгу ритуалов одного класса и накладываете её ритуалы.', 'Intelligence or Wisdom 13 or higher', 'Интеллект или Мудрость 13 или выше' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Ritual Caster')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Savage Attacker', 'Once per turn, reroll melee weapon damage and use either total.', NULL, NULL, 'Savage Attacker', 'Свирепый атакующий', 'Once per turn, reroll melee weapon damage and use either total.', 'Раз в ход перебрасываете урон ближнего оружия и берёте любой результат.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Savage Attacker')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sentinel', 'Stop foes you hit with opportunity attacks; attack creatures that strike your allies.', NULL, NULL, 'Sentinel', 'Страж', 'Stop foes you hit with opportunity attacks; attack creatures that strike your allies.', 'Останавливаете врагов, задетых провоцированной атакой; атакуете тех, кто бьёт ваших союзников.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Sentinel')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sharpshooter', 'Ignore long range and cover penalties; take -5 to hit for +10 ranged damage.', NULL, NULL, 'Sharpshooter', 'Меткий стрелок', 'Ignore long range and cover penalties; take -5 to hit for +10 ranged damage.', 'Игнорируете дальнюю дистанцию и укрытие; −5 к попаданию ради +10 к дальнему урону.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Sharpshooter')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shield Master', 'Bonus-action shove with shield; add shield AC to DEX saves; negate some area damage.', NULL, NULL, 'Shield Master', 'Мастер щита', 'Bonus-action shove with shield; add shield AC to DEX saves; negate some area damage.', 'Бонусный толчок щитом; добавляете КД щита к спасброскам Лов; отменяете часть площадного урона.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Shield Master')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Skilled', 'Gain proficiency in any three skills or tools of your choice.', NULL, NULL, 'Skilled', 'Умелый', 'Gain proficiency in any three skills or tools of your choice.', 'Владение любыми тремя навыками или инструментами на ваш выбор.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Skilled')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Skulker', 'Hide when lightly obscured; missing a ranged attack doesn''t reveal you; see in dim light.', NULL, NULL, 'Skulker', 'Скрытник', 'Hide when lightly obscured; missing a ranged attack doesn''t reveal you; see in dim light.', 'Прячетесь при лёгком укрытии; промах дальней атакой не выдаёт вас; видите в тусклом свете.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Skulker')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Spell Sniper', 'Double spell-attack range; ignore cover; learn one attack cantrip.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', NULL, 'Spell Sniper', 'Магический снайпер', 'Double spell-attack range; ignore cover; learn one attack cantrip.', 'Удваиваете дальность атакующих заклинаний; игнорируете укрытие; изучаете один атакующий заговор.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', 'способность накладывать хотя бы одно заклинание' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Spell Sniper')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Tavern Brawler', '+1 STR or CON; proficient with improvised weapons; bonus-action grapple after an unarmed hit.', NULL, NULL, 'Tavern Brawler', 'Кабацкий драчун', '+1 STR or CON; proficient with improvised weapons; bonus-action grapple after an unarmed hit.', '+1 Сил или Тел; владение импровизированным оружием; бонусный захват после безоружного удара.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Tavern Brawler')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Tough', 'Your hit point maximum increases by 2 per character level.', NULL, NULL, 'Tough', 'Крепкий', 'Your hit point maximum increases by 2 per character level.', 'Максимум хитов увеличивается на 2 за каждый уровень персонажа.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Tough')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'War Caster', 'Advantage on concentration saves; cast with hands full; cast a spell as an opportunity attack.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', NULL, 'War Caster', 'Боевой заклинатель', 'Advantage on concentration saves; cast with hands full; cast a spell as an opportunity attack.', 'Преимущество на спасброски концентрации; колдуете с занятыми руками; накладываете заклинание как провоцированную атаку.', 'the ability to cast at least one spell', 'способность накладывать хотя бы одно заклинание' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'War Caster')

INSERT INTO feats (id, name, description, prerequisites, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, prerequisites_engloc, prerequisites_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Weapon Master', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with four weapons of your choice.', NULL, NULL, 'Weapon Master', 'Мастер оружия', '+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with four weapons of your choice.', '+1 Сил или Лов; владение четырьмя видами оружия на ваш выбор.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feats WHERE name = 'Weapon Master')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.comment: Class + subclass features and active abilities
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Rage', 'Bonus action: gain rage bonuses (advantage on STR, bonus melee damage, damage resistance). Limited uses per long rest.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"uses": {"1": 2, "3": 3, "6": 4, "12": 5, "17": 6, "20": "unlimited"}, "damage": {"1": 2, "9": 3, "16": 4}}', NULL, 'Rage', 'Ярость', 'Bonus action: gain rage bonuses (advantage on STR, bonus melee damage, damage resistance). Limited uses per long rest.', 'Бонусное действие: бонусы ярости (преимущество на Силу, бонус к ближнему урону, сопротивление урону). Ограниченные использования за продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Rage')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Reckless Attack', 'Gain advantage on melee STR attacks this turn; attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Reckless Attack', 'Безрассудная атака', 'Gain advantage on melee STR attacks this turn; attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.', 'Преимущество на ближние атаки Силой в этот ход; атаки по вам с преимуществом до вашего следующего хода.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Reckless Attack')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Danger Sense', 'Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see while not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Danger Sense', 'Чувство опасности', 'Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see while not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.', 'Преимущество на спасброски Ловкости против видимых эффектов, пока не ослеплены, оглохли или недееспособны.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Danger Sense')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Second Wind', 'Bonus action: regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points. Once per short or long rest.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', '1d10', 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Second Wind', 'Второе дыхание', 'Bonus action: regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points. Once per short or long rest.', 'Бонусное действие: восстановить 1d10 + уровень воина хитов. Раз в короткий или продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Second Wind')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Action Surge', 'Take one additional action on your turn. Once per short or long rest.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Action Surge', 'Всплеск действий', 'Take one additional action on your turn. Once per short or long rest.', 'Дополнительное действие в свой ход. Раз в короткий или продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Action Surge')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sneak Attack', 'Once per turn deal extra damage to a target you have advantage on, or that is near your ally.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', '1d6', 0, NULL, '{"dice": {"1": "1d6", "3": "2d6", "5": "3d6", "7": "4d6", "9": "5d6", "11": "6d6", "13": "7d6", "15": "8d6", "17": "9d6", "19": "10d6"}}', NULL, 'Sneak Attack', 'Скрытая атака', 'Once per turn deal extra damage to a target you have advantage on, or that is near your ally.', 'Раз в ход доп. урон цели, по которой есть преимущество или рядом с которой ваш союзник.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Sneak Attack')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Cunning Action', 'Bonus action each turn to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Cunning Action', 'Хитрое действие', 'Bonus action each turn to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.', 'Бонусным действием каждый ход: Рывок, Отход или Засада.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Cunning Action')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bardic Inspiration', 'Bonus action: give an ally a die to add to one check, attack, or save.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', '1d6', 0, NULL, '{"die": {"1": "d6", "5": "d8", "10": "d10", "15": "d12"}}', NULL, 'Bardic Inspiration', 'Вдохновение барда', 'Bonus action: give an ally a die to add to one check, attack, or save.', 'Бонусное действие: дать союзнику кость для добавления к одной проверке, атаке или спасброску.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Channel Divinity', 'Channel divine energy for a domain effect or to turn/destroy undead. Limited uses per rest.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"uses": {"1": 1, "6": 2, "18": 3}}', NULL, 'Channel Divinity', 'Божественный канал', 'Channel divine energy for a domain effect or to turn/destroy undead. Limited uses per rest.', 'Направить божественную энергию на эффект домена или изгнание/уничтожение нежити. Ограниченные использования за отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Channel Divinity')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Wild Shape', 'Action: magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen. Limited uses per short or long rest.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"max_cr": {"2": "1/4", "4": "1/2", "8": "1"}, "hours": {"2": 1, "4": 2, "8": 4, "12": 6, "16": 8, "20": 10}}', NULL, 'Wild Shape', 'Дикий облик', 'Action: magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen. Limited uses per short or long rest.', 'Действие: магически принять облик виденного зверя. Ограниченные использования за короткий или продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Wild Shape')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Divine Sense', 'Action: detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft until your next turn.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Divine Sense', 'Божественное чувство', 'Action: detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft until your next turn.', 'Действие: обнаружить небожителей, исчадий и нежить в пределах 60 футов до вашего следующего хода.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Divine Sense')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Lay on Hands', 'Touch to restore hit points from a pool equal to 5 × paladin level, or cure disease/poison.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"hp_pool": "5 * paladin level"}', NULL, 'Lay on Hands', 'Наложение рук', 'Touch to restore hit points from a pool equal to 5 × paladin level, or cure disease/poison.', 'Касанием восстановить хиты из запаса в 5 × уровень паладина или излечить болезнь/яд.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Lay on Hands')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Divine Smite', 'On a melee hit, expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage (2d8, +1d8 per higher slot).', 'CLASS_FEATURE', '2d8', 0, 'RADIANT', '{"max_dice": {"2": "2d8", "3": "3d8", "5": "4d8", "9": "5d8", "13": "5d8"}}', NULL, 'Divine Smite', 'Божественная кара', 'On a melee hit, expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage (2d8, +1d8 per higher slot).', 'При ближнем попадании потратить ячейку заклинания ради доп. урона излучением (2d8, +1d8 за ячейку выше).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Divine Smite')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Flurry of Blows', 'Spend 1 ki after Attack to make two unarmed strikes as a bonus action.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Flurry of Blows', 'Шквал ударов', 'Spend 1 ki after Attack to make two unarmed strikes as a bonus action.', 'Потратить 1 ци после Атаки, чтобы нанести два безоружных удара бонусным действием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Flurry of Blows')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Patient Defense', 'Spend 1 ki to take the Dodge action as a bonus action.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Patient Defense', 'Терпеливая защита', 'Spend 1 ki to take the Dodge action as a bonus action.', 'Потратить 1 ци, чтобы совершить Уклонение бонусным действием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Patient Defense')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Step of the Wind', 'Spend 1 ki to Disengage or Dash as a bonus action; jump distance doubled.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Step of the Wind', 'Шаг ветра', 'Spend 1 ki to Disengage or Dash as a bonus action; jump distance doubled.', 'Потратить 1 ци на Отход или Рывок бонусным действием; дальность прыжка удваивается.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Step of the Wind')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Favored Enemy', 'Advantage on Survival to track and Intelligence to recall info about chosen enemy types.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Favored Enemy', 'Излюбленный враг', 'Advantage on Survival to track and Intelligence to recall info about chosen enemy types.', 'Преимущество на Выживание для выслеживания и Интеллект для воспоминаний о выбранных типах врагов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Favored Enemy')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Natural Explorer', 'Expertise in a favored terrain: difficult terrain, foraging, and tracking benefits.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Natural Explorer', 'Прирождённый исследователь', 'Expertise in a favored terrain: difficult terrain, foraging, and tracking benefits.', 'Мастерство в излюбленной местности: труднопроходимость, добыча пропитания и выслеживание.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Natural Explorer')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Martial Arts', 'Use DEX for unarmed/monk weapons, roll a martial-arts die for damage, and make a bonus unarmed strike.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', '1d4', 0, NULL, '{"die": {"1": "d4", "5": "d6", "11": "d8", "17": "d10"}}', NULL, 'Martial Arts', 'Боевые искусства', 'Use DEX for unarmed/monk weapons, roll a martial-arts die for damage, and make a bonus unarmed strike.', 'Используйте Лов для безоружных/монашеских атак, бросайте кость боевых искусств и бейте безоружно бонусным действием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Martial Arts')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Drink Healing Potion', 'Action: drink a potion to regain hit points.', 'ITEM_ACTIVATION', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Drink Healing Potion', 'Выпить зелье лечения', 'Action: drink a potion to regain hit points.', 'Действие: выпить зелье, чтобы восстановить хиты.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Drink Healing Potion')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Unarmored Defense', 'While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + a class modifier (CON for barbarians, WIS for monks).', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Unarmored Defense', 'Защита без доспехов', 'While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + a class modifier (CON for barbarians, WIS for monks).', 'Без доспехов КД = 10 + мод. Лов + модификатор класса (Тел у варвара, Мдр у монаха).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Unarmored Defense')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Extra Attack', 'Attack twice whenever you take the Attack action (some classes gain further attacks at higher levels).', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"attacks": {"5": 2, "11": 3, "20": 4}}', NULL, 'Extra Attack', 'Дополнительная атака', 'Attack twice whenever you take the Attack action (some classes gain further attacks at higher levels).', 'Атакуете дважды, когда совершаете действие Атака (у части классов — больше атак на высоких уровнях).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Extra Attack')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Fighting Style', 'Adopt a combat specialty (e.g. Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Archery) for a lasting bonus.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Fighting Style', 'Боевой стиль', 'Adopt a combat specialty (e.g. Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Archery) for a lasting bonus.', 'Выбираете боевую специализацию (Защита, Дуэль, Большое оружие, Стрельба и т.п.) ради постоянного бонуса.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Fighting Style')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Evasion', 'On a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on a success and half on a failure.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Evasion', 'Увёртливость', 'On a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on a success and half on a failure.', 'При спасброске Лов на половину урона: при успехе урона нет, при провале — половина.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Evasion')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Expertise', 'Double your proficiency bonus for two chosen skill or tool proficiencies.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Expertise', 'Компетентность', 'Double your proficiency bonus for two chosen skill or tool proficiencies.', 'Удваиваете бонус мастерства для двух выбранных навыков или владений инструментами.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Expertise')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Fast Movement', 'Your speed increases by 10 ft while you aren''t wearing heavy armor.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Fast Movement', 'Быстрое передвижение', 'Your speed increases by 10 ft while you aren''t wearing heavy armor.', 'Скорость увеличивается на 10 футов, пока вы не в тяжёлом доспехе.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Fast Movement')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Feral Instinct', 'Advantage on initiative; if surprised, you can act normally on your first turn if you rage first.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Feral Instinct', 'Звериные инстинкты', 'Advantage on initiative; if surprised, you can act normally on your first turn if you rage first.', 'Преимущество на инициативу; будучи застигнутым врасплох, можете действовать в первый ход, если сперва впадёте в ярость.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Feral Instinct')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Brutal Critical', 'Roll extra weapon damage dice on a melee critical hit (more dice at higher levels).', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, '{"dice": {"9": 1, "13": 2, "17": 3}}', NULL, 'Brutal Critical', 'Жестокий крит', 'Roll extra weapon damage dice on a melee critical hit (more dice at higher levels).', 'Бросаете доп. кости урона оружия при ближнем крите (больше костей на высоких уровнях).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Brutal Critical')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Relentless Rage', 'When dropped to 0 HP while raging, make a CON save (DC rising each use) to drop to 1 HP instead.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Relentless Rage', 'Неудержимая ярость', 'When dropped to 0 HP while raging, make a CON save (DC rising each use) to drop to 1 HP instead.', 'При падении до 0 хитов в ярости — спасбросок Тел (Сл растёт), чтобы остаться на 1 хите.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Relentless Rage')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Persistent Rage', 'Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Persistent Rage', 'Стойкая ярость', 'Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.', 'Ярость прекращается досрочно, только если вы потеряли сознание или решили её закончить.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Persistent Rage')
