Хар часов воспоминаний' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Alter Memories')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Evocation Savant', 'Copying evocation spells costs half gold and time', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Evocation Savant', 'Знаток Воплощения', 'Copying evocation spells costs half gold and time', 'Копирование заклинаний Воплощения стоит вдвое меньше золота и времени' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Evocation Savant')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sculpt Spells', 'Evocation spell: choose up to 1+spell level allies to auto-succeed save and take 0 damage', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Sculpt Spells', 'Ваяние заклинаний', 'Evocation spell: choose up to 1+spell level allies to auto-succeed save and take 0 damage', 'Воплощение: выбрать до 1+круг союзников — авто-успех спасброска и 0 урона' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Sculpt Spells')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Potent Cantrip', 'Cantrip: target takes half damage on successful save', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Potent Cantrip', 'Мощный заговор', 'Cantrip: target takes half damage on successful save', 'Заговор: цель получает половину урона при успехе спасброска' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Potent Cantrip')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Empowered Evocation', 'Add INT modifier to damage of wizard evocation spells', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Empowered Evocation', 'Усиленное воплощение', 'Add INT modifier to damage of wizard evocation spells', 'Мод. Инт к урону заклинаний Воплощения волшебника' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Empowered Evocation')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Overchannel', 'Maximise damage of a 5th-level-or-lower spell; 2d12 necrotic per spell level for subsequent uses before long rest', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Overchannel', 'Перенасыщение', 'Maximise damage of a 5th-level-or-lower spell; 2d12 necrotic per spell level for subsequent uses before long rest', 'Максимальный урон заклинания 5-го круга или ниже; 2d12 некротического за круг при повторном использовании до долгого отдыха' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Overchannel')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Illusion Savant', 'Copying illusion spells costs half gold and time', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Illusion Savant', 'Знаток Иллюзии', 'Copying illusion spells costs half gold and time', 'Копирование заклинаний Иллюзии стоит вдвое меньше золота и времени' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Illusion Savant')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Improved Minor Illusion', 'Minor Illusion can create both sound and image simultaneously', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Improved Minor Illusion', 'Улучшенная Малая иллюзия', 'Minor Illusion can create both sound and image simultaneously', 'Малая иллюзия может создавать звук и изображение одновременно' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Improved Minor Illusion')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Malleable Illusions', 'Action: change the nature of an ongoing illusion spell', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Malleable Illusions', 'Податливые иллюзии', 'Action: change the nature of an ongoing illusion spell', 'Действие: изменить характер активного заклинания иллюзии' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Malleable Illusions')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Illusory Self', 'Reaction when attacked: create illusory duplicate that takes the hit; once per short/long rest', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Illusory Self', 'Иллюзорный двойник', 'Reaction when attacked: create illusory duplicate that takes the hit; once per short/long rest', 'Реакция при атаке: иллюзорная копия принимает удар; раз за короткий/долгий отдых' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Illusory Self')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Illusory Reality', 'When you cast an illusion 1st+, choose one object in it to become real for 1 min', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Illusory Reality', 'Иллюзорная реальность', 'When you cast an illusion 1st+, choose one object in it to become real for 1 min', 'При заклинании иллюзии 1-го круга+ один предмет в ней становится реальным на 1 мин' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Illusory Reality')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Necromancy Savant', 'Copying necromancy spells costs half gold and time', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Necromancy Savant', 'Знаток Некромантии', 'Copying necromancy spells costs half gold and time', 'Копирование заклинаний Некромантии стоит вдвое меньше золота и времени' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Necromancy Savant')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Grim Harvest', 'When you kill with a spell 1st+, regain HP = 2*spell level (3* for Necromancy)', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Grim Harvest', 'Мрачная жатва', 'When you kill with a spell 1st+, regain HP = 2*spell level (3* for Necromancy)', 'При убийстве заклинанием 1-го круга+ — восстановить ОЗ = 2×круг (3× для Некромантии)' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Grim Harvest')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Undead Thralls', 'Animate Dead: +1 undead; undead HP +wizard level, damage +proficiency', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Undead Thralls', 'Порабощённая нежить', 'Animate Dead: +1 undead; undead HP +wizard level, damage +proficiency', 'Поднятие мёртвых: +1 нежить; ОЗ нежити +уровень волшебника, урон +бонус владения' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Undead Thralls')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Inured to Undeath', 'Resistance to necrotic damage; HP max can''t be reduced', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Inured to Undeath', 'Привычка к нежизни', 'Resistance to necrotic damage; HP max can''t be reduced', 'Сопротивление некротическому урону; максимум ОЗ нельзя уменьшить' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Inured to Undeath')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Command Undead', 'Action: one undead must make CHA save or obey you permanently (INT 8+ saves with advantage, repeat daily)', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Command Undead', 'Подчинение нежити', 'Action: one undead must make CHA save or obey you permanently (INT 8+ saves with advantage, repeat daily)', 'Действие: одна нежить — спасбросок Хар или подчинение навсегда (Инт 8+ — с преимуществом, повтор ежедневно)' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Command Undead')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Transmutation Savant', 'Copying transmutation spells costs half gold and time', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Transmutation Savant', 'Знаток Трансмутации', 'Copying transmutation spells costs half gold and time', 'Копирование заклинаний Трансмутации стоит вдвое меньше золота и времени' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Transmutation Savant')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Minor Alchemy', 'Transmute 1 cubic foot of wood/stone/iron/copper/silver into another of those; lasts 1 hour', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Minor Alchemy', 'Малая алхимия', 'Transmute 1 cubic foot of wood/stone/iron/copper/silver into another of those; lasts 1 hour', 'Превращение 1 куб. фута дерева/камня/железа/меди/серебра в другой материал; длится 1 час' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Minor Alchemy')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Transmuter''s Stone', 'Create a stone granting: darkvision 60 ft, +10 speed, CON save proficiency, or resistance to one element', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Transmuter''s Stone', 'Камень трансмутатора', 'Create a stone granting: darkvision 60 ft, +10 speed, CON save proficiency, or resistance to one element', 'Камень, дающий: тёмное зрение 60 фт, +10 скорость, владение спасброском Тел или сопротивление одному элементу' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Transmuter''s Stone')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shapechanger', 'Add Polymorph to spellbook; cast on self without a spell slot once per short rest', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Shapechanger', 'Перевёртыш', 'Add Polymorph to spellbook; cast on self without a spell slot once per short rest', 'Добавить Превращение в книгу; использовать на себя без ячейки раз за короткий отдых' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Shapechanger')

INSERT INTO skills (id, name, description, skill_type, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, scaling_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Master Transmuter', 'Destroy Transmuter''s Stone for one effect: transmute material, Remove Curse/Restore/Raise Dead, or youth', 'CLASS_FEATURE', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Master Transmuter', 'Мастер трансмутации', 'Destroy Transmuter''s Stone for one effect: transmute material, Remove Curse/Restore/Raise Dead, or youth', 'Уничтожить камень ради эффекта: трансмутация, снятие проклятия/восстановление/воскрешение или омоложение' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skills WHERE name = 'Master Transmuter')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Acolyte', 'You have spent your life in service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon.', '["Insight", "Religion"]', 'Two languages of your choice; holy symbol, prayer book, vestments', NULL, 'Acolyte', 'Прислужник', 'You have spent your life in service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon.', 'Вы провели жизнь в служении храму определённого бога или пантеона.', 'Two languages of your choice; holy symbol, prayer book, vestments', 'Два языка на ваш выбор; священный символ, молитвенник, облачение' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Acolyte')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Charlatan', 'You have always had a way with people and a talent for manipulation.', '["Deception", "Sleight of Hand"]', 'Disguise kit, forgery kit', NULL, 'Charlatan', 'Шарлатан', 'You have always had a way with people and a talent for manipulation.', 'Вы всегда умели находить подход к людям и обладали талантом к манипуляции.', 'Disguise kit, forgery kit', 'Набор для грима, набор для подделок' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Charlatan')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Criminal', 'You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.', '["Deception", "Stealth"]', 'One gaming set, thieves'' tools', NULL, 'Criminal', 'Преступник', 'You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.', 'Вы опытный преступник с историей нарушения закона.', 'One gaming set, thieves'' tools', 'Один игровой набор, воровские инструменты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Criminal')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Entertainer', 'You thrive in front of an audience, knowing how to entrance and inspire.', '["Acrobatics", "Performance"]', 'Disguise kit, one musical instrument', NULL, 'Entertainer', 'Артист', 'You thrive in front of an audience, knowing how to entrance and inspire.', 'Вы процветаете перед публикой, умея зачаровывать и вдохновлять.', 'Disguise kit, one musical instrument', 'Набор для грима, один музыкальный инструмент' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Entertainer')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Folk Hero', 'You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.', '["Animal Handling", "Survival"]', 'One artisan''s tools, vehicles (land)', NULL, 'Folk Hero', 'Народный герой', 'You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.', 'Вы из простого сословия, но вам уготовано гораздо большее.', 'One artisan''s tools, vehicles (land)', 'Один ремесленный инструмент, наземный транспорт' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Folk Hero')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Guild Artisan', 'You are a member of an artisan''s guild, skilled in a particular field.', '["Insight", "Persuasion"]', 'One artisan''s tools, one language of your choice', NULL, 'Guild Artisan', 'Гильдейский ремесленник', 'You are a member of an artisan''s guild, skilled in a particular field.', 'Вы член ремесленной гильдии, мастер в своей области.', 'One artisan''s tools, one language of your choice', 'Один ремесленный инструмент, один язык на ваш выбор' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Guild Artisan')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Hermit', 'You lived in seclusion for a formative part of your life.', '["Medicine", "Religion"]', 'Herbalism kit, one language of your choice', NULL, 'Hermit', 'Отшельник', 'You lived in seclusion for a formative part of your life.', 'Важную часть жизни вы прожили в уединении.', 'Herbalism kit, one language of your choice', 'Набор травника, один язык на ваш выбор' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Hermit')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Noble', 'You understand wealth, power, and privilege and carry a title of nobility.', '["History", "Persuasion"]', 'One gaming set, one language of your choice', NULL, 'Noble', 'Благородный', 'You understand wealth, power, and privilege and carry a title of nobility.', 'Вы понимаете богатство, власть и привилегии и носите дворянский титул.', 'One gaming set, one language of your choice', 'Один игровой набор, один язык на ваш выбор' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Noble')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Outlander', 'You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and its comforts.', '["Athletics", "Survival"]', 'One musical instrument, one language of your choice', NULL, 'Outlander', 'Чужеземец', 'You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and its comforts.', 'Вы выросли в глуши, вдали от цивилизации и её удобств.', 'One musical instrument, one language of your choice', 'Один музыкальный инструмент, один язык на ваш выбор' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Outlander')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sage', 'You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.', '["Arcana", "History"]', 'Two languages of your choice', NULL, 'Sage', 'Мудрец', 'You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.', 'Вы годами изучали знания мультивселенной.', 'Two languages of your choice', 'Два языка на ваш выбор' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Sage')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sailor', 'You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years and weathered many a storm.', '["Athletics", "Perception"]', 'Navigator''s tools, vehicles (water)', NULL, 'Sailor', 'Моряк', 'You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years and weathered many a storm.', 'Вы годами ходили под парусом и пережили немало штормов.', 'Navigator''s tools, vehicles (water)', 'Инструменты навигатора, водный транспорт' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Sailor')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Soldier', 'War has been your life for as long as you care to remember.', '["Athletics", "Intimidation"]', 'One gaming set, vehicles (land)', NULL, 'Soldier', 'Солдат', 'War has been your life for as long as you care to remember.', 'Война была вашей жизнью столько, сколько вы себя помните.', 'One gaming set, vehicles (land)', 'Один игровой набор, наземный транспорт' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Soldier')

INSERT INTO backgrounds (id, name, description, skill_proficiency_ids_json, granted_extras, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, granted_extras_engloc, granted_extras_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Urchin', 'You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned and poor.', '["Sleight of Hand", "Stealth"]', 'Disguise kit, thieves'' tools', NULL, 'Urchin', 'Беспризорник', 'You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned and poor.', 'Вы росли на улицах в одиночку, сиротой и в бедности.', 'Disguise kit, thieves'' tools', 'Набор для грима, воровские инструменты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM backgrounds WHERE name = 'Urchin')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO character_races (id, name, slug, description, lore_description, source_type, source_name, active, homebrew_id, creature_type, size_options_json, default_size, speed_json, darkvision_range, traits_json, lineages_json, lineage_required, languages_json, language_options_json, proficiencies_json, resistances_json, vulnerabilities_json, immunities_json, condition_resistances_json, condition_advantages_json, innate_spells_json, allow_ability_score_bonuses, ability_score_bonuses_json, metadata_json, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, lore_description_engloc, lore_description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dwarf', 'dwarf', 'Bold and hardy folk, known as skilled warriors, miners, and workers of stone and metal.', NULL, 'SYSTEM', 'Player''s Handbook', TRUE, NULL, 'HUMANOID', '["MEDIUM"]', 'MEDIUM', '{"walk": 25}', 60, '[{"name": "Dwarven Resilience", "description": "Advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance to poison damage.", "actionType": "PASSIVE", "useType": "PASSIVE", "recharge": "NONE", "uses": null, "nameEngloc": "Dwarven Resilience", "nameRusloc": "Дварфская устойчивость", "descriptionEngloc": "Advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance to poison damage.", "descriptionRusloc": "Преимущество на спасброски против яда и сопротивление урону ядом."}, {"name": Раз в продолжительный отдых."}, {"name": "Savage Attacks", "description": "On a melee weapon critical hit, roll one extra weapon damage die.", "actionType": "PASSIVE", "useType": "PASSIVE", "recharge": "NONE", "uses": null, "nameEngloc": "Savage Attacks", "nameRusloc": "Жестокие атаки", "descriptionEngloc": "On a melee weapon critical hit, roll one extra weapon damage die.", "descriptionRusloc": "При крите ближним оружием бросьте на одну кость урона больше."}]', '[]', FALSE, '["Common", "Orc"]', NULL, '["Intimidation"]', '[]', '[]', '[]', '[]', '[]', '[]', FALSE, '[{"ability": "STRENGTH", "value": 2, "mode": "FIXED"}, {"ability": "CONSTITUTION", "value": 1, "mode": "FIXED"}]', NULL, 'Half-Orc', 'Полуорк', 'Marked by their orcish heritage, fierce and strong, valuing might and endurance.', 'Отмеченные орочьим наследием, свирепые и сильные, ценящие мощь и выносливость.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_races WHERE name = 'Half-Orc')

INSERT INTO character_races (id, name, slug, description, lore_description, source_type, source_name, active, homebrew_id, creature_type, size_options_json, default_size, speed_json, darkvision_range, traits_json, lineages_json, lineage_required, languages_json, language_options_json, proficiencies_json, resistances_json, vulnerabilities_json, immunities_json, condition_resistances_json, condition_advantages_json, innate_spells_json, allow_ability_score_bonuses, ability_score_bonuses_json, metadata_json, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, lore_description_engloc, lore_description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Tiefling', 'tiefling', 'Bearing the mark of an infernal bloodline, regarded with suspicion and fear.', NULL, 'SYSTEM', 'Player''s Handbook', TRUE, NULL, 'HUMANOID', '["MEDIUM"]', 'MEDIUM', '{"walk": 30}', 60, '[{"name": "Hellish Resistance", "description": "Resistance to fire damage.", "actionType": "PASSIVE", "useType": "PASSIVE", "recharge": "NONE", "uses": null, "nameEngloc": "Hellish Resistance", "nameRusloc": "Адское сопротивление", "descriptionEngloc": "Resistance to fire damage.", "descriptionRusloc": "Сопротивление урону огнём."}, {"name": "Infernal Legacy", "description": "Know Thaumaturgy; gain Hellish Rebuke at 3rd level and Darkness at 5th level (CHA-based).", "actionType": "ACTION", "useType": "LIMITED", "recharge": "LONG_REST", "uses": 1, "nameEngloc": "Infernal Legacy", "nameRusloc": "Инфернальное наследие", "descriptionEngloc": "Know Thaumaturgy; gain Hellish Rebuke at 3rd level and Darkness at 5th level (CHA-based).", "descriptionRusloc": "Знаете Чудотворство; получаете Адское возмездие на 3-м и Тьму на 5-м уровне (на основе Харизмы)."}]', '[]', FALSE, '["Common", "Infernal"]', NULL, '[]', '["FIRE"]', '[]', '[]', '[]', '[]', '[{"name": "Thaumaturgy", "level": 0, "atLevel": 1, "nameEngloc": "Thaumaturgy", "nameRusloc": "Чудотворство"}, {"name": "Hellish Rebuke", "level": 1, "atLevel": 3, "nameEngloc": "Hellish Rebuke", "nameRusloc": "Адское возмездие"}, {"name": "Darkness", "level": 2, "atLevel": 5, "nameEngloc": "Darkness", "nameRusloc": "Тьма"}]', FALSE, '[{"ability": "INTELLIGENCE", "value": 1, "mode": "FIXED"}, {"ability": "CHARISMA", "value": 2, "mode": "FIXED"}]', NULL, 'Tiefling', 'Тифлинг', 'Bearing the mark of an infernal bloodline, regarded with suspicion and fear.', 'Носящий печать инфернальной крови, встречаемый с подозрением и страхом.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_races WHERE name = 'Tiefling')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Barbarian', 'A fierce warrior who channels primal fury into devastating rage.', NULL, 12, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Strength'), '["Strength", "Constitution"]', 2, '["Animal Handling", "Athletics", "Intimidation", "Nature", "Perception", "Survival"]', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', FALSE, NULL, FALSE, FALSE, 'Barbarian', 'Варвар', 'A fierce warrior who channels primal fury into devastating rage.', 'Свирепый воин, обращающий первобытную ярость в разрушительную мощь.', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', 'Лёгкие и средние доспехи, щиты, простое и воинское оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Barbarian')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bard', 'An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), '["Dexterity", "Charisma"]', 3, '["Athletics", "Acrobatics", "Sleight of Hand", "Stealth", "Arcana", "History", "Investigation", "Nature", "Religion", "Animal Handling", "Insight", "Medicine", "Perception", "Survival", "Deception", "Intimidation", "Performance", "Persuasion"]', 'Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Bard', 'Бард', 'An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation.', 'Вдохновляющий маг, чья сила вторит музыке творения.', 'Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords', 'Лёгкие доспехи, простое оружие, ручные арбалеты, длинные мечи, рапиры, короткие мечи' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Bard')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Cleric', 'A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), '["Wisdom", "Charisma"]', 2, '["History", "Insight", "Medicine", "Persuasion", "Religion"]', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple weapons', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Cleric', 'Жрец', 'A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.', 'Жреческий поборник, владеющий божественной магией во служение высшей силе.', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple weapons', 'Лёгкие и средние доспехи, щиты, простое оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Druid', 'A priest of the Old Faith, wielding nature magic and shapeshifting.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), '["Intelligence", "Wisdom"]', 2, '["Arcana", "Animal Handling", "Insight", "Medicine", "Nature", "Perception", "Religion", "Survival"]', 'Light and medium armor (nonmetal), shields (nonmetal), clubs, daggers, darts, javelins, maces, quarterstaffs, scimitars, sickles, slings, spears', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Druid', 'Друид', 'A priest of the Old Faith, wielding nature magic and shapeshifting.', 'Жрец Старой Веры, владеющий магией природы и оборотничеством.', 'Light and medium armor (nonmetal), shields (nonmetal), clubs, daggers, darts, javelins, maces, quarterstaffs, scimitars, sickles, slings, spears', 'Лёгкие и средние доспехи (неметаллические), щиты (неметаллические), дубинки, кинжалы, дротики, метательные копья, булавы, боевые посохи, скимитары, серпы, пращи, копья' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Druid')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Fighter', 'A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.', NULL, 10, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Strength'), '["Strength", "Constitution"]', 2, '["Acrobatics", "Animal Handling", "Athletics", "History", "Insight", "Intimidation", "Perception", "Survival"]', 'All armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', FALSE, NULL, FALSE, FALSE, 'Fighter', 'Воин', 'A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.', 'Мастер боя, искусный с разнообразным оружием и доспехами.', 'All armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', 'Все доспехи, щиты, простое и воинское оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Fighter')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Monk', 'A martial artist who harnesses the power of ki through disciplined body and mind.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), '["Strength", "Dexterity"]', 2, '["Acrobatics", "Athletics", "History", "Insight", "Religion", "Stealth"]', 'Simple weapons, shortswords; no armor', FALSE, NULL, FALSE, FALSE, 'Monk', 'Монах', 'A martial artist who harnesses the power of ki through disciplined body and mind.', 'Мастер боевых искусств, обуздавший энергию ци дисциплиной тела и разума.', 'Simple weapons, shortswords; no armor', 'Простое оружие, короткие мечи; без доспехов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Monk')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Paladin', 'A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath, blending martial skill with divine magic.', NULL, 10, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Strength'), '["Wisdom", "Charisma"]', 2, '["Athletics", "Insight", "Intimidation", "Medicine", "Persuasion", "Religion"]', 'All armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), FALSE, TRUE, 'Paladin', 'Паладин', 'A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath, blending martial skill with divine magic.', 'Святой воитель, связанный священной клятвой, сочетающий боевое мастерство и божественную магию.', 'All armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', 'Все доспехи, щиты, простое и воинское оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Paladin')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ranger', 'A warrior of the wilderness who blends combat skill with nature magic.', NULL, 10, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), '["Strength", "Dexterity"]', 3, '["Animal Handling", "Athletics", "Insight", "Investigation", "Nature", "Perception", "Stealth", "Survival"]', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Wisdom'), FALSE, TRUE, 'Ranger', 'Следопыт', 'A warrior of the wilderness who blends combat skill with nature magic.', 'Воин дикой природы, сочетающий боевое мастерство с магией природы.', 'Light and medium armor, shields, simple and martial weapons', 'Лёгкие и средние доспехи, щиты, простое и воинское оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Ranger')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Rogue', 'A skillful expert in stealth, subterfuge, and precise strikes.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Dexterity'), '["Dexterity", "Intelligence"]', 4, '["Acrobatics", "Athletics", "Deception", "Insight", "Intimidation", "Investigation", "Perception", "Performance", "Persuasion", "Sleight of Hand", "Stealth"]', 'Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords', FALSE, NULL, FALSE, FALSE, 'Rogue', 'Плут', 'A skillful expert in stealth, subterfuge, and precise strikes.', 'Искусный мастер скрытности, хитрости и точных ударов.', 'Light armor, simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords', 'Лёгкие доспехи, простое оружие, ручные арбалеты, длинные мечи, рапиры, короткие мечи' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Rogue')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sorcerer', 'A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.', NULL, 6, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), '["Constitution", "Charisma"]', 2, '["Arcana", "Deception", "Insight", "Intimidation", "Persuasion", "Religion"]', 'Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows; no armor', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Sorcerer', 'Чародей', 'A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.', 'Заклинатель, черпающий врождённую магию из дара или родословной.', 'Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows; no armor', 'Кинжалы, дротики, пращи, боевые посохи, лёгкие арбалеты; без доспехов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Sorcerer')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Warlock', 'A wielder of magic derived from a bargain with an otherworldly patron.', NULL, 8, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), '["Wisdom", "Charisma"]', 2, '["Arcana", "Deception", "History", "Intimidation", "Investigation", "Nature", "Religion"]', 'Light armor, simple weapons', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Charisma'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Warlock', 'Колдун', 'A wielder of magic derived from a bargain with an otherworldly patron.', 'Владеющий магией, обретённой по договору с потусторонним покровителем.', 'Light armor, simple weapons', 'Лёгкие доспехи, простое оружие' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Warlock')

INSERT INTO character_classes (id, name, description, homebrew_id, hit_die, primary_ability_stat_id, saving_throw_stat_ids_json, skill_choice_count, skill_choice_option_ids_json, armor_weapon_proficiencies, is_spellcaster, spellcasting_stat_id, has_cantrips, is_half_caster, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_engloc, armor_weapon_proficiencies_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Wizard', 'A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.', NULL, 6, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), '["Intelligence", "Wisdom"]', 2, '["Arcana", "History", "Insight", "Investigation", "Medicine", "Religion"]', 'Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows; no armor', TRUE, (SELECT id FROM stat_types WHERE name = 'Intelligence'), TRUE, FALSE, 'Wizard', 'Волшебник', 'A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.', 'Учёный маг, способный изменять саму структуру реальности.', 'Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows; no armor', 'Кинжалы, дротики, пращи, боевые посохи, лёгкие арбалеты; без доспехов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ki Points', 'Mystical energy of the Monk; regained on short or long rest.', 2, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Monk'), NULL, 'Ki Points', 'Очки ци', 'Mystical energy of the Monk; regained on short or long rest.', 'Мистическая энергия монаха; восстанавливается на коротком или продолжительном отдыхе.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Ki Points')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sorcery Points', 'Wellspring of magic the Sorcerer spends on Metamagic; regained on long rest.', 2, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Sorcerer'), NULL, 'Sorcery Points', 'Очки чародейства', 'Wellspring of magic the Sorcerer spends on Metamagic; regained on long rest.', 'Источник магии чародея для Метамагии; восстанавливается на продолжительном отдыхе.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Sorcery Points')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Superiority Dice', 'Battle Master maneuvers dice (d8); regained on short or long rest.', 4, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Fighter'), NULL, 'Superiority Dice', 'Кости превосходства', 'Battle Master maneuvers dice (d8); regained on short or long rest.', 'Кости приёмов Мастера боя (d8); восстанавливаются на коротком или продолжительном отдыхе.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Superiority Dice')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bardic Inspiration Uses', 'Number of Bardic Inspiration dice available; CHA-mod per rest.', 2, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Bard'), NULL, 'Bardic Inspiration Uses', 'Использования вдохновения барда', 'Number of Bardic Inspiration dice available; CHA-mod per rest.', 'Число доступных костей Вдохновения барда; по модификатору Харизмы за отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration Uses')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Channel Divinity', 'Uses of Channel Divinity per short or long rest.', 1, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), NULL, 'Channel Divinity', 'Божественный канал', 'Uses of Channel Divinity per short or long rest.', 'Использования Божественного канала за короткий или продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Channel Divinity')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Wild Shape Uses', 'Number of Wild Shape transformations per short or long rest.', 2, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Druid'), NULL, 'Wild Shape Uses', 'Использования дикого облика', 'Number of Wild Shape transformations per short or long rest.', 'Число превращений Дикого облика за короткий или продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Wild Shape Uses')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Rage Uses', 'Number of times the Barbarian can rage per long rest.', 2, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Barbarian'), NULL, 'Rage Uses', 'Использования ярости', 'Number of times the Barbarian can rage per long rest.', 'Сколько раз варвар может впадать в ярость за продолжительный отдых.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Rage Uses')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Lay on Hands Pool', 'Pool of healing points (5 × paladin level) restored on long rest.', 5, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Paladin'), NULL, 'Lay on Hands Pool', 'Запас наложения рук', 'Pool of healing points (5 × paladin level) restored on long rest.', 'Запас лечения (5 × уровень паладина), восстанавливается на продолжительном отдыхе.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Lay on Hands Pool')

INSERT INTO custom_resource_types (id, name, description, max_value, class_bound_id, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Sneak Attack Dice', 'Number of d6 dealt by Sneak Attack (scales with rogue level).', 1, (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Rogue'), NULL, 'Sneak Attack Dice', 'Кости скрытой атаки', 'Number of d6 dealt by Sneak Attack (scales with rogue level).', 'Число d6 урона Скрытой атаки (растёт с уровнем плута).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM custom_resource_types WHERE name = 'Sneak Attack Dice')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Path of the Berserker', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Barbarian'), 'Channels rage into a frenzy of extra attacks at the cost of exhaustion.', NULL, 'Path of the Berserker', 'Путь берсерка', 'Channels rage into a frenzy of extra attacks at the cost of exhaustion.', 'Обращает ярость в шквал дополнительных атак ценой истощения.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Path of the Berserker')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Path of the Totem Warrior', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Barbarian'), 'Adopts a spirit animal totem granting resilience and primal powers.', NULL, 'Path of the Totem Warrior', 'Путь тотемного воина', 'Adopts a spirit animal totem granting resilience and primal powers.', 'Принимает тотем духа-зверя, дающий стойкость и первобытные силы.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Path of the Totem Warrior')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'College of Lore', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Bard'), 'Masters of knowledge who gain extra skills and Cutting Words to undercut foes.', NULL, 'College of Lore', 'Коллегия знаний', 'Masters of knowledge who gain extra skills and Cutting Words to undercut foes.', 'Мастера знаний; получают доп. навыки и Острое словцо, чтобы сбивать врагов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'College of Lore')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'College of Valor', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Bard'), 'Battle-skilled bards who inspire allies in combat and gain martial training.', NULL, 'College of Valor', 'Коллегия доблести', 'Battle-skilled bards who inspire allies in combat and gain martial training.', 'Барды-воины, вдохновляющие союзников в бою и обученные воинскому делу.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'College of Valor')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Knowledge Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Values learning; gains extra languages, skills, and divination.', NULL, 'Knowledge Domain', 'Домен знаний', 'Values learning; gains extra languages, skills, and divination.', 'Ценит учёность; даёт доп. языки, навыки и прорицание.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Knowledge Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Life Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Master of healing magic, boosting all cure spells.', NULL, 'Life Domain', 'Домен жизни', 'Master of healing magic, boosting all cure spells.', 'Мастер лечебной магии, усиливающий все исцеляющие заклинания.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Life Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Light Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Wields radiant fire and the Warding Flare to blunt attacks.', NULL, 'Light Domain', 'Домен света', 'Wields radiant fire and the Warding Flare to blunt attacks.', 'Владеет сияющим огнём и Защитной вспышкой, ослабляющей атаки.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Light Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Nature Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Priest of nature gods with druid-like powers over beasts and plants.', NULL, 'Nature Domain', 'Домен природы', 'Priest of nature gods with druid-like powers over beasts and plants.', 'Жрец богов природы с друидоподобной властью над зверями и растениями.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Nature Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Tempest Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Commands thunder and lightning with maximized destructive bursts.', NULL, 'Tempest Domain', 'Домен бури', 'Commands thunder and lightning with maximized destructive bursts.', 'Повелевает громом и молнией с максимальными разрушительными вспышками.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Tempest Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Trickery Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Deception and illusion specialist who blesses allies with stealth.', NULL, 'Trickery Domain', 'Домен обмана', 'Deception and illusion specialist who blesses allies with stealth.', 'Мастер обмана и иллюзий, благословляющий союзников скрытностью.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Trickery Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'War Domain', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Cleric'), 'Martial priest granting bonus attacks and combat divinity.', NULL, 'War Domain', 'Домен войны', 'Martial priest granting bonus attacks and combat divinity.', 'Воинственный жрец, дающий дополнительные атаки и боевую божественность.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'War Domain')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Circle of the Land', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Druid'), 'Draws on the magic of a specific terrain for extra spells and recovery.', NULL, 'Circle of the Land', 'Круг земли', 'Draws on the magic of a specific terrain for extra spells and recovery.', 'Черпает магию конкретной местности ради доп. заклинаний и восстановления.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Circle of the Land')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Circle of the Moon', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Druid'), 'Combat shapeshifter able to assume powerful beast forms.', NULL, 'Circle of the Moon', 'Круг луны', 'Combat shapeshifter able to assume powerful beast forms.', 'Боевой оборотень, способный принимать облик могучих зверей.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Circle of the Moon')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Champion', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Fighter'), 'Simple, deadly fighter with improved critical hits and athletics.', NULL, 'Champion', 'Чемпион', 'Simple, deadly fighter with improved critical hits and athletics.', 'Простой и смертоносный воин с улучшенными критами и атлетикой.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Champion')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Battle Master', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Fighter'), 'Tactician who learns combat maneuvers fueled by superiority dice.', NULL, 'Battle Master', 'Мастер боя', 'Tactician who learns combat maneuvers fueled by superiority dice.', 'Тактик, осваивающий боевые приёмы на костях превосходства.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Battle Master')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Eldritch Knight', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Fighter'), 'Fighter who learns wizard spells, mostly abjuration and evocation.', NULL, 'Eldritch Knight', 'Мистический рыцарь', 'Fighter who learns wizard spells, mostly abjuration and evocation.', 'Воин, изучающий заклинания волшебника, в основном ограждения и воплощения.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Eldritch Knight')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Way of the Open Hand', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Monk'), 'Master of unarmed combat who manipulates a target''s ki.', NULL, 'Way of the Open Hand', 'Путь открытой ладони', 'Master of unarmed combat who manipulates a target''s ki.', 'Мастер безоружного боя, управляющий ци цели.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Way of the Open Hand')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Way of Shadow', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Monk'), 'Ninja-like monk using shadow magic for stealth and teleportation.', NULL, 'Way of Shadow', 'Путь тени', 'Ninja-like monk using shadow magic for stealth and teleportation.', 'Монах-ниндзя, использующий магию тени для скрытности и телепортации.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Way of Shadow')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Way of the Four Elements', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Monk'), 'Bends elemental ki into spell-like Elemental Disciplines.', NULL, 'Way of the Four Elements', 'Путь четырёх стихий', 'Bends elemental ki into spell-like Elemental Disciplines.', 'Обращает стихийную ци в заклинательные Стихийные дисциплины.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Way of the Four Elements')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Oath of Devotion', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Paladin'), 'Upholds justice and honor; smites fiends and undead.', NULL, 'Oath of Devotion', 'Клятва преданности', 'Upholds justice and honor; smites fiends and undead.', 'Блюдёт справедливость и честь; карает исчадий и нежить.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Oath of Devotion')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Oath of the Ancients', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Paladin'), 'Champion of light and life with strong defensive auras.', NULL, 'Oath of the Ancients', 'Клятва предков', 'Champion of light and life with strong defensive auras.', 'Поборник света и жизни с сильными защитными аурами.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Oath of the Ancients')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Oath of Vengeance', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Paladin'), 'Relentless avenger focused on hunting down wrongdoers.', NULL, 'Oath of Vengeance', 'Клятва возмездия', 'Relentless avenger focused on hunting down wrongdoers.', 'Неумолимый мститель, выслеживающий злодеев.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Oath of Vengeance')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Hunter', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Ranger'), 'Versatile monster-slayer with tactical combat options.', NULL, 'Hunter', 'Охотник', 'Versatile monster-slayer with tactical combat options.', 'Универсальный истребитель чудовищ с тактическими боевыми опциями.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Hunter')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Beast Master', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Ranger'), 'Bonds with an animal companion that fights alongside them.', NULL, 'Beast Master', 'Повелитель зверей', 'Bonds with an animal companion that fights alongside them.', 'Связан со зверем-компаньоном, сражающимся рядом.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Beast Master')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Thief', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Rogue'), 'Fast-handed burglar with Fast Hands and climbing prowess.', NULL, 'Thief', 'Вор', 'Fast-handed burglar with Fast Hands and climbing prowess.', 'Быстрорукий взломщик с Ловкими руками и сноровкой к лазанью.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Thief')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Assassin', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Rogue'), 'Deadly infiltrator who strikes with poison and disguises.', NULL, 'Assassin', 'Убийца', 'Deadly infiltrator who strikes with poison and disguises.', 'Смертоносный лазутчик, разящий ядом и маскировкой.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Assassin')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Arcane Trickster', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Rogue'), 'Rogue with enchantment and illusion wizard magic and Mage Hand tricks.', NULL, 'Arcane Trickster', 'Мистический ловкач', 'Rogue with enchantment and illusion wizard magic and Mage Hand tricks.', 'Плут с магией очарования и иллюзий волшебника и трюками Волшебной руки.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Arcane Trickster')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Draconic Bloodline', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Sorcerer'), 'Descendant of dragons with elemental affinity and tougher hide.', NULL, 'Draconic Bloodline', 'Драконья родословная', 'Descendant of dragons with elemental affinity and tougher hide.', 'Потомок драконов со стихийным сродством и прочной кожей.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Draconic Bloodline')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Wild Magic', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Sorcerer'), 'Chaotic sorcery that triggers random surges of magical effects.', NULL, 'Wild Magic', 'Дикая магия', 'Chaotic sorcery that triggers random surges of magical effects.', 'Хаотичная магия, вызывающая случайные всплески эффектов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'Wild Magic')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'The Archfey', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Warlock'), 'Pact with a fey lord granting charm and misty escape powers.', NULL, 'The Archfey', 'Архифея', 'Pact with a fey lord granting charm and misty escape powers.', 'Договор с владыкой фей, дающий силы очарования и туманного бегства.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'The Archfey')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'The Fiend', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Warlock'), 'Pact with a fiend granting temporary hit points and fiery power.', NULL, 'The Fiend', 'Исчадие', 'Pact with a fiend granting temporary hit points and fiery power.', 'Договор с исчадием, дающий временные хиты и огненную мощь.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'The Fiend')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'The Great Old One', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Warlock'), 'Pact with an alien entity granting telepathy and mind magic.', NULL, 'The Great Old One', 'Великий Древний', 'Pact with an alien entity granting telepathy and mind magic.', 'Договор с чуждой сущностью, дающий телепатию и магию разума.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'The Great Old One')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Abjuration', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Specialist in protective magic with an Arcane Ward.', NULL, 'School of Abjuration', 'Школа ограждения', 'Specialist in protective magic with an Arcane Ward.', 'Специалист по защитной магии с Мистическим щитом.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Abjuration')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Conjuration', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Master of summoning and teleportation magic.', NULL, 'School of Conjuration', 'Школа вызова', 'Master of summoning and teleportation magic.', 'Мастер призыва и телепортационной магии.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Conjuration')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Divination', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Foresees the future and can replace rolls with Portent.', NULL, 'School of Divination', 'Школа прорицания', 'Foresees the future and can replace rolls with Portent.', 'Предвидит будущее и может заменять броски Предзнаменованием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Divination')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Enchantment', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Bends minds with charm and hypnosis magic.', NULL, 'School of Enchantment', 'Школа очарования', 'Bends minds with charm and hypnosis magic.', 'Подчиняет разум магией очарования и гипноза.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Enchantment')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Evocation', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Focuses on elemental damage while sculpting spells around allies.', NULL, 'School of Evocation', 'Школа воплощения', 'Focuses on elemental damage while sculpting spells around allies.', 'Сосредоточен на стихийном уроне, обходя союзников при формировании заклинаний.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Evocation')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Illusion', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Crafts deceptive illusions that can become partly real.', NULL, 'School of Illusion', 'Школа иллюзии', 'Crafts deceptive illusions that can become partly real.', 'Создаёт обманчивые иллюзии, способные становиться отчасти реальными.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Illusion')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Necromancy', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Commands undead and drains life from foes.', NULL, 'School of Necromancy', 'Школа некромантии', 'Commands undead and drains life from foes.', 'Повелевает нежитью и вытягивает жизнь из врагов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Necromancy')

INSERT INTO subclasses (id, name, class_id, description, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'School of Transmutation', (SELECT id FROM character_classes WHERE name = 'Wizard'), 'Alters matter and energy, transforming the world.', NULL, 'School of Transmutation', 'Школа преобразования', 'Alters matter and energy, transforming the world.', 'Изменяет материю и энергию, преображая мир.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subclasses WHERE name = 'School of Transmutation')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.comment: Weapons, armor, gear categories with properties & AC (59)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Club', 'Club.', 'MAIN_HAND', '1d4', 0, 'BLUDGEONING', 'Light', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Club', 'Дубинка', 'Club.', 'Дубинка.', 'Light', 'Лёгкое' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Club')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dagger', 'Dagger.', 'MAIN_HAND', '1d4', 0, 'PIERCING', 'Finesse, Light, Thrown (20/60)', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Dagger', 'Кинжал', 'Dagger.', 'Кинжал.', 'Finesse, Light, Thrown (20/60)', 'Фехтовальное, Лёгкое, Метательное (20/60)' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Dagger')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Greatclub', 'Greatclub.', 'MAIN_HAND', '1d8', 0, 'BLUDGEONING', 'Two-Handed', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Greatclub', 'Большая дубина', 'Greatclub.', 'Большая дубина.', 'Two-Handed', 'Двуручное' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Greatclub')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Handaxe', 'Handaxe.', 'MAIN_HAND', '1d6', 0, 'SLASHING', 'Light, Thrown (20/60)', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Handaxe', 'Ручной топор', 'Handaxe.', 'Ручной топор.', 'Light, Thrown (20/60)', 'Лёгкое, Метательное (20/60)' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Handaxe')
