INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shield', '+2 AC while wielded.', 'OFF_HAND', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, 2, NULL, NULL, FALSE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Shield', 'Щит', '+2 AC while wielded.', '+2 к КД, пока используется.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Shield')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Potion', 'A magical consumable liquid.', 'OFF_HAND', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Potion', 'Зелье', 'A magical consumable liquid.', 'Магическая расходуемая жидкость.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Potion')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Adventuring Gear', 'General non-combat equipment.', 'OFF_HAND', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Adventuring Gear', 'Снаряжение искателя приключений', 'General non-combat equipment.', 'Общее небоевое снаряжение.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ammunition', 'Projectiles spent by ranged weapons.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Ammunition', 'Боеприпасы', 'Projectiles spent by ranged weapons.', 'Снаряды, расходуемые дальнобойным оружием.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Ammunition')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Tool', 'Tools, kits, gaming sets, and musical instruments.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Tool', 'Инструмент', 'Tools, kits, gaming sets, and musical instruments.', 'Инструменты, наборы, игровые наборы и музыкальные инструменты.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Tool')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Spellcasting Focus', 'An object used as a focus for casting spells.', 'OFF_HAND', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Spellcasting Focus', 'Фокус заклинателя', 'An object used as a focus for casting spells.', 'Предмет, используемый как фокус для накладывания заклинаний.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Spellcasting Focus')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Equipment Pack', 'A bundled collection of adventuring gear.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Equipment Pack', 'Набор снаряжения', 'A bundled collection of adventuring gear.', 'Связка снаряжения искателя приключений.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Equipment Pack')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Mount', 'A riding or pack animal.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Mount', 'Верховое животное', 'A riding or pack animal.', 'Верховое или вьючное животное.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Mount')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Vehicle', 'Tack, harness, drawn vehicles, and waterborne vessels.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Vehicle', 'Транспорт', 'Tack, harness, drawn vehicles, and waterborne vessels.', 'Упряжь, повозки и водный транспорт.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Vehicle')

INSERT INTO item_types (id, name, description, slot, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, properties, base_ac, max_dex_bonus, str_requirement, stealth_disadvantage, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, properties_engloc, properties_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Trade Good', 'Commodities valued for trade.', NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Trade Good', 'Товар', 'Commodities valued for trade.', 'Товары, ценимые для торговли.', NULL, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Trade Good')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.comment: All PHB spells with full metadata (342)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Acid Splash', 0, 'Conjuration', 'Hurl a bubble of acid; one or two creatures take 1d6 acid (DEX save).', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Acid Splash', 'Кислотные брызги', 'Hurl a bubble of acid; one or two creatures take 1d6 acid (DEX save).', 'Бросьте пузырь кислоты; одно-два существа получают 1d6 кислотой (спасбросок Лов).', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Acid Splash')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Chill Touch', 0, 'Necromancy', 'A ghostly hand deals 1d8 necrotic and prevents the target from healing for a turn.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, '1 round', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Chill Touch', 'Леденящее прикосновение', 'A ghostly hand deals 1d8 necrotic and prevents the target from healing for a turn.', 'Призрачная рука наносит 1d8 некротическим и мешает цели лечиться до вашего следующего хода.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, '1 round', '1 раунд' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Chill Touch')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dancing Lights', 0, 'Evocation', 'Create up to four floating torch-like lights you can move.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Dancing Lights', 'Пляшущие огоньки', 'Create up to four floating torch-like lights you can move.', 'Создаёт до четырёх парящих факелоподобных огоньков, которыми можно управлять.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Dancing Lights')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Druidcraft', 0, 'Transmutation', 'Minor nature effects: predict weather, bloom a flower, snuff a flame.', '1 action', '30 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Druidcraft', 'Искусство друидов', 'Minor nature effects: predict weather, bloom a flower, snuff a flame.', 'Мелкие природные эффекты: предсказать погоду, раскрыть цветок, погасить пламя.', '1 action', '1 действие', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Druidcraft')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Eldritch Blast', 0, 'Evocation', 'A beam of crackling force deals 1d10; gain extra beams at higher levels.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Warlock'))::text, NULL, 'Eldritch Blast', 'Мистический заряд', 'A beam of crackling force deals 1d10; gain extra beams at higher levels.', 'Луч потрескивающей силы наносит 1d10; доп. лучи на высоких уровнях.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Eldritch Blast')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Fire Bolt', 0, 'Evocation', 'Hurl a mote of fire dealing 1d10 fire damage.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Fire Bolt', 'Огненный снаряд', 'Hurl a mote of fire dealing 1d10 fire damage.', 'Бросьте искру огня, наносящую 1d10 урона огнём.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Fire Bolt')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Guidance', 0, 'Divination', 'Touch an ally to add 1d4 to one ability check.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Guidance', 'Указание', 'Touch an ally to add 1d4 to one ability check.', 'Касанием союзника добавьте 1d4 к одной проверке характеристики.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Guidance')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Light', 0, 'Evocation', 'Touch an object to make it shed bright light in a 20-ft radius.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, M', 'a firefly or phosphorescent moss', '1 hour', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Light', 'Свет', 'Touch an object to make it shed bright light in a 20-ft radius.', 'Касанием предмет начинает излучать яркий свет в радиусе 20 футов.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, M', 'В, М', 'a firefly or phosphorescent moss', NULL, '1 hour', '1 час' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Light')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Mage Hand', 0, 'Conjuration', 'Create a spectral hand to manipulate objects at range.', '1 action', '30 feet', 'V, S', NULL, '1 minute', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Sorcerer', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Mage Hand', 'Рука мага', 'Create a spectral hand to manipulate objects at range.', 'Создаёт призрачную руку для манипуляции предметами на расстоянии.', '1 action', '1 действие', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, '1 minute', '1 минута' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Mage Hand')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Arcane Lock', 2, 'Abjuration', 'Magically lock a door or chest; only you and chosen creatures pass freely.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'gold dust worth at least 25 gp, which the spell consumes', 'Until dispelled', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Arcane Lock', 'Магический замок', 'Magically lock a door or chest; only you and chosen creatures pass freely.', 'Магически запираете дверь или сундук; свободно проходите только вы и избранные.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'gold dust worth at least 25 gp, which the spell consumes', NULL, 'Until dispelled', 'Пока не рассеется' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Arcane Lock')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Barkskin', 2, 'Transmutation', 'A willing creature''s AC can''t be lower than 16.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'a handful of oak bark', 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid', 'Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Barkskin', 'Кора', 'A willing creature''s AC can''t be lower than 16.', 'КД согласного существа не может быть ниже 16.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a handful of oak bark', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Barkskin')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Flaming Sphere', 2, 'Conjuration', 'A rolling ball of fire deals 2d6 to creatures near it (DEX save).', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and powdered iron', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Flaming Sphere', 'Огненная сфера', 'A rolling ball of fire deals 2d6 to creatures near it (DEX save).', 'Катящийся огненный шар наносит 2d6 существам рядом (спасбросок Лов).', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and powdered iron', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Flaming Sphere')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Gentle Repose', 2, 'Necromancy', 'Protect a corpse from decay and from being raised as undead.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'a pinch of salt and a copper piece on each of the corpse''s eyes', '10 days', FALSE, TRUE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Gentle Repose', 'Бережный покой', 'Protect a corpse from decay and from being raised as undead.', 'Защищаете труп от разложения и от обращения в нежить.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a pinch of salt and a copper piece on each of the corpse''s eyes', NULL, '10 days', '10 дней' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Gentle Repose')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Gust of Wind', 2, 'Evocation', 'A line of strong wind pushes creatures and disperses gas (STR save).', '1 action', 'Self (60-foot line)', 'V, S, M', 'a legume seed', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Gust of Wind', 'Порыв ветра', 'A line of strong wind pushes creatures and disperses gas (STR save).', 'Линия сильного ветра толкает существ и развеивает газ (спасбросок Сил).', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self (60-foot line)', 'На себя (линия 60 футов)', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a legume seed', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Gust of Wind')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Heat Metal', 2, 'Transmutation', 'Make a metal object glow hot for 2d8 fire and force it to be dropped.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a piece of iron and a flame', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Heat Metal', 'Раскалённый металл', 'Make a metal object glow hot for 2d8 fire and force it to be dropped.', 'Раскаляете металлический предмет на 2d8 огнём, вынуждая его выронить.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a piece of iron and a flame', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Heat Metal')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Knock', 2, 'Transmutation', 'Loudly unlock a locked, stuck, or barred object.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Knock', 'Стук', 'Loudly unlock a locked, stuck, or barred object.', 'Громко отпираете запертый, заклинивший или забаррикадированный предмет.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V', 'В', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Knock')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Lesser Restoration', 2, 'Abjuration', 'End one disease or the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned condition.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Druid', 'Paladin', 'Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Lesser Restoration', 'Малое восстановление', 'End one disease or the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned condition.', 'Снимаете одну болезнь либо состояние: ослеплён, оглох, парализован или отравлен.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Lesser Restoration')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Levitate', 2, 'Transmutation', 'Raise a creature or object vertically up to 20 ft (CON save).', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup', 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Levitate', 'Левитация', 'Raise a creature or object vertically up to 20 ft (CON save).', 'Поднимаете существо или предмет вертикально до 20 футов (спасбросок Тел).', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Levitate')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Locate Animals or Plants', 2, 'Divination', 'Sense the nearest kind of chosen animal or plant within 5 miles.', '1 action', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'a bit of fur from a bloodhound', 'Instantaneous', FALSE, TRUE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Druid', 'Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Locate Animals or Plants', 'Поиск животных или растений', 'Sense the nearest kind of chosen animal or plant within 5 miles.', 'Ощущаете ближайший вид выбранного животного или растения в пределах 5 миль.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a bit of fur from a bloodhound', NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Locate Animals or Plants')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Locate Object', 2, 'Divination', 'Sense the direction to a known or described object within 1,000 ft.', '1 action', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'a forked twig', 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Druid', 'Paladin', 'Ranger', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Locate Object', 'Поиск предмета', 'Sense the direction to a known or described object within 1,000 ft.', 'Ощущаете направление к известному или описанному предмету в пределах 1000 футов.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a forked twig', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Locate Object')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Magic Mouth', 2, 'Illusion', 'Implant a message that plays when a chosen trigger occurs.', '1 minute', '30 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a bit of honeycomb and jade dust worth at least 10 gp', 'Until dispelled', FALSE, TRUE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Magic Mouth', 'Волшебные уста', 'Implant a message that plays when a chosen trigger occurs.', 'Закладываете сообщение, звучащее при выбранном условии.', '1 minute', '1 минута', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a bit of honeycomb and jade dust worth at least 10 gp', NULL, 'Until dispelled', 'Пока не рассеется' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Magic Mouth')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'See Invisibility', 2, 'Divination', 'See invisible creatures and into the Ethereal Plane for 1 hour.', '1 action', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'a pinch of talc and a sprinkling of powdered silver', '1 hour', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'See Invisibility', 'Видение невидимого', 'See invisible creatures and into the Ethereal Plane for 1 hour.', 'Видите невидимых существ и Эфирный план в течение 1 часа.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a pinch of talc and a sprinkling of powdered silver', NULL, '1 hour', '1 час' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'See Invisibility')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Silence', 2, 'Illusion', 'Create a 20-ft sphere where no sound can be made or pass.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, TRUE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Silence', 'Тишина', 'Create a 20-ft sphere where no sound can be made or pass.', 'Создаёте сферу 20 футов, где нельзя издавать звук и звук не проходит.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Silence')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Spider Climb', 2, 'Transmutation', 'Move along walls and ceilings with your hands free.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'a drop of bitumen and a spider', 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Spider Climb', 'Паучье лазание', 'Move along walls and ceilings with your hands free.', 'Двигаетесь по стенам и потолкам со свободными руками.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a drop of bitumen and a spider', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Spider Climb')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Call Lightning', 3, 'Conjuration', 'Summon a storm cloud; call bolts for 3d10 lightning (DEX save).', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Call Lightning', 'Призыв молнии', 'Summon a storm cloud; call bolts for 3d10 lightning (DEX save).', 'Создаёте грозовое облако; вызываете разряды на 3d10 электричеством (спасбросок Лов).', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Call Lightning')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Clairvoyance', 3, 'Divination', 'Create a sensor to see or hear a distant, familiar location.', '10 minutes', '1 mile', 'V, S, M', 'a focus worth at least 100 gp: a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing', 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Clairvoyance', 'Ясновидение', 'Create a sensor to see or hear a distant, familiar location.', 'Создаёте сенсор, чтобы видеть или слышать удалённое знакомое место.', '10 minutes', '10 минут', '1 mile', '1 миля', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a focus worth at least 100 gp: a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Clairvoyance')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Conjure Animals', 3, 'Conjuration', 'Summon fey spirits in the form of beasts to fight for you.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid', 'Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Conjure Animals', 'Призыв животных', 'Summon fey spirits in the form of beasts to fight for you.', 'Призываете духов фей в облике зверей сражаться за вас.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Conjure Animals')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Conjure Barrage', 3, 'Conjuration', 'Launch a volley of weapons in a 60-ft cone for 3d8 (DEX save).', '1 action', 'Self (60-foot cone)', 'V, S, M', 'one piece of ammunition or a thrown weapon', 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Ranger'))::text, NULL, 'Conjure Barrage', 'Призыв шквала', 'Launch a volley of weapons in a 60-ft cone for 3d8 (DEX save).', 'Запускаете залп оружия в конусе 60 футов на 3d8 (спасбросок Лов).', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self (60-foot cone)', 'На себя (конус 60 футов)', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'one piece of ammunition or a thrown weapon', NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Conjure Barrage')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Guardian of Faith', 4, 'Conjuration', 'A spectral guardian deals 20 radiant to enemies that approach.', '1 action', '30 feet', 'V', NULL, '8 hours', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric'))::text, NULL, 'Guardian of Faith', 'Страж веры', 'A spectral guardian deals 20 radiant to enemies that approach.', 'Призрачный страж наносит 20 излучением врагам, что приближаются.', '1 action', '1 действие', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V', 'В', NULL, NULL, '8 hours', '8 часов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Guardian of Faith')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Antilife Shell', 5, 'Abjuration', 'A barrier prevents living creatures from passing through.', '1 action', 'Self (10-foot radius)', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Antilife Shell', 'Оболочка от живого', 'A barrier prevents living creatures from passing through.', 'Барьер не пропускает живых существ.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self (10-foot radius)', 'На себя (радиус 10 футов)', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Antilife Shell')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Awaken', 5, 'Transmutation', 'Give a beast or plant sentience and the ability to speak.', '8 hours', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'an agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes', 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Awaken', 'Пробуждение', 'Give a beast or plant sentience and the ability to speak.', 'Наделяете зверя или растение разумом и речью.', '8 hours', '8 часов', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'an agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes', NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Awaken')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Banishing Smite', 5, 'Abjuration', 'Your next hit deals an extra 5d10 force and can banish a weakened target.', '1 bonus action', 'Self', 'V', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Paladin'))::text, NULL, 'Banishing Smite', 'Изгоняющая кара', 'Your next hit deals an extra 5d10 force and can banish a weakened target.', 'Следующее попадание наносит доп. 5d10 силовым и может изгнать ослабленную цель.', '1 bonus action', '1 бонусное действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V', 'В', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Banishing Smite')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Bigby''s Hand', 5, 'Evocation', 'A large spectral hand grapples, shoves, or strikes for 4d8 force.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S, M', 'an eggshell and a snakeskin glove', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Bigby''s Hand', 'Рука Бигби', 'A large spectral hand grapples, shoves, or strikes for 4d8 force.', 'Большая призрачная рука хватает, толкает или бьёт на 4d8 силовым.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'an eggshell and a snakeskin glove', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Bigby''s Hand')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Circle of Power', 5, 'Abjuration', 'Allies near you gain advantage on saves vs magic and can negate half-damage effects.', '1 action', 'Self (30-foot radius)', 'V', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Paladin'))::text, NULL, 'Circle of Power', 'Круг силы', 'Allies near you gain advantage on saves vs magic and can negate half-damage effects.', 'Союзники рядом получают преимущество на спасброски от магии и могут свести урон к нулю.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self (30-foot radius)', 'На себя (радиус 30 футов)', 'V', 'В', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 10 minutes', 'Концентрация, до 10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Circle of Power')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Commune', 5, 'Divination', 'Ask your deity up to three yes-or-no questions.', '1 minute', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'incense and a vial of holy or unholy water', '1 minute', FALSE, TRUE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric'))::text, NULL, 'Commune', 'Общение', 'Ask your deity up to three yes-or-no questions.', 'Задаёте божеству до трёх вопросов «да/нет».', '1 minute', '1 минута', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'incense and a vial of holy or unholy water', NULL, '1 minute', '1 минута' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Commune')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Creation', 5, 'Illusion', 'Create a nonliving object of vegetable or mineral matter.', '1 minute', '30 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a tiny piece of matter of the same type as the item you plan to create', 'Special', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Creation', 'Сотворение', 'Create a nonliving object of vegetable or mineral matter.', 'Создаёте неживой предмет из растительного или минерального вещества.', '1 minute', '1 минута', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a tiny piece of matter of the same type as the item you plan to create', NULL, 'Special', 'Особая' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Creation')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Destructive Wave', 5, 'Evocation', 'A burst deals 5d6 thunder plus 5d6 radiant or necrotic and knocks prone (CON save).', '1 action', 'Self (30-foot radius)', 'V', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Paladin'))::text, NULL, 'Destructive Wave', 'Разрушительная волна', 'A burst deals 5d6 thunder plus 5d6 radiant or necrotic and knocks prone (CON save).', 'Взрыв наносит 5d6 звуком и 5d6 излучением или некротическим и сбивает с ног (спасбросок Тел).', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self (30-foot radius)', 'На себя (радиус 30 футов)', 'V', 'В', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Destructive Wave')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dispel Evil and Good', 5, 'Abjuration', 'Protect against and dismiss aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead.', '1 action', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'holy water or powdered silver and iron', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Paladin'))::text, NULL, 'Dispel Evil and Good', 'Рассеивание добра и зла', 'Protect against and dismiss aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead.', 'Защищаете от аберраций, небожителей, элементалей, фей, исчадий и нежити и изгоняете их.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'holy water or powdered silver and iron', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Dispel Evil and Good')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Dream', 5, 'Illusion', 'Shape a creature''s dreams, possibly causing fright and psychic damage.', '1 minute', 'Special', 'V, S, M', 'a handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a quill from a sleeping bird', '8 hours', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Dream', 'Сон (заклинание)', 'Shape a creature''s dreams, possibly causing fright and psychic damage.', 'Изменяете сны существа, способны вызвать испуг и психический урон.', '1 minute', '1 минута', 'Special', 'Особая', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a quill from a sleeping bird', NULL, '8 hours', '8 часов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Dream')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Greater Restoration', 5, 'Abjuration', 'End a serious affliction: charm, petrification, a curse, or ability/HP reduction.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'diamond dust worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes', 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric', 'Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Greater Restoration', 'Высшее восстановление', 'End a serious affliction: charm, petrification, a curse, or ability/HP reduction.', 'Снимаете тяжёлую напасть: очарование, окаменение, проклятие или снижение характеристики/хитов.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'diamond dust worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes', NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Greater Restoration')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Hallow', 5, 'Evocation', 'Imbue an area with protective and thematic magical effects.', '24 hours', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'herbs, oils, and incense worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes', 'Until dispelled', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric'))::text, NULL, 'Hallow', 'Освящение', 'Imbue an area with protective and thematic magical effects.', 'Наполняете область защитными и тематическими магическими эффектами.', '24 hours', '24 часа', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'herbs, oils, and incense worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes', NULL, 'Until dispelled', 'Пока не рассеется' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Hallow')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Planar Ally', 6, 'Conjuration', 'Call on an otherworldly being to bargain for aid.', '10 minutes', '60 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric'))::text, NULL, 'Planar Ally', 'Союзник с плана', 'Call on an otherworldly being to bargain for aid.', 'Призываете внеплановое существо для торга о помощи.', '10 minutes', '10 минут', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Planar Ally')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Programmed Illusion', 6, 'Illusion', 'Create an illusion that plays out when triggered.', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 gp', 'Until dispelled', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Programmed Illusion', 'Запрограммированная иллюзия', 'Create an illusion that plays out when triggered.', 'Создаёте иллюзию, разыгрывающуюся при срабатывании условия.', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 gp', NULL, 'Until dispelled', 'Пока не рассеется' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Programmed Illusion')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Control Weather', 8, 'Transmutation', 'Change the weather over a wide area.', '10 minutes', 'Self (5-mile radius)', 'V, S, M', 'burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water', 'Concentration, up to 8 hours', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Druid', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Control Weather', 'Управление погодой', 'Change the weather over a wide area.', 'Меняете погоду на обширной территории.', '10 minutes', '10 минут', 'Self (5-mile radius)', 'На себя (радиус 5 миль)', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 8 hours', 'Концентрация, до 8 часов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Control Weather')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Demiplane', 8, 'Conjuration', 'Create a door to a small extradimensional room.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'S', NULL, '1 hour', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Demiplane', 'Полуплан', 'Create a door to a small extradimensional room.', 'Создаёте дверь в небольшую внепространственную комнату.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'S', 'С', NULL, NULL, '1 hour', '1 час' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Demiplane')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Earthquake', 8, 'Evocation', 'Shake the ground, toppling structures and opening fissures (DEX save).', '1 action', '500 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Druid', 'Sorcerer'))::text, NULL, 'Earthquake', 'Землетрясение', 'Shake the ground, toppling structures and opening fissures (DEX save).', 'Сотрясаете землю, рушите строения и открываете расщелины (спасбросок Лов).', '1 action', '1 действие', '500 feet', '500 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Earthquake')
