INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Foresight', 9, 'Divination', 'A creature gains advantage on rolls and can''t be surprised for 8 hours.', '1 minute', 'Touch', 'V, S, M', 'a hummingbird feather', '8 hours', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Druid', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Foresight', 'Предвидение', 'A creature gains advantage on rolls and can''t be surprised for 8 hours.', 'Существо получает преимущество на броски и не может быть застигнуто врасплох 8 часов.', '1 minute', '1 минута', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a hummingbird feather', NULL, '8 hours', '8 часов' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Foresight')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Gate', 9, 'Conjuration', 'Open a portal to another plane and call a specific being.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a diamond worth at least 5,000 gp', 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Cleric', 'Sorcerer', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Gate', 'Врата', 'Open a portal to another plane and call a specific being.', 'Открываете портал на другой план и призываете определённое существо.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a diamond worth at least 5,000 gp', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Gate')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Imprisonment', 9, 'Abjuration', 'Bind a creature in a lasting magical prison (WIS save).', '1 minute', '30 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a depiction or statuette of the target and a special component worth at least 500 gp per Hit Die of the target', 'Until dispelled', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Imprisonment', 'Заточение', 'Bind a creature in a lasting magical prison (WIS save).', 'Заключаете существо в долговременную магическую тюрьму (спасбросок Мдр).', '1 minute', '1 минута', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a depiction or statuette of the target and a special component worth at least 500 gp per Hit Die of the target', NULL, 'Until dispelled', 'Пока не рассеется' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Imprisonment')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Power Word Heal', 9, 'Evocation', 'Fully heal a creature and end most conditions afflicting it.', '1 action', 'Touch', 'V, S', NULL, 'Instantaneous', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Cleric'))::text, NULL, 'Power Word Heal', 'Слово силы: лечение', 'Fully heal a creature and end most conditions afflicting it.', 'Полностью исцеляете существо и снимаете большинство состояний.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Touch', 'Касание', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Instantaneous', 'Мгновенная' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Power Word Heal')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Prismatic Wall', 9, 'Abjuration', 'A multilayered wall of light with varied harmful effects.', '1 action', '60 feet', 'V, S', NULL, '10 minutes', FALSE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Prismatic Wall', 'Радужная стена', 'A multilayered wall of light with varied harmful effects.', 'Многослойная стена света с разными вредоносными эффектами.', '1 action', '1 действие', '60 feet', '60 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, '10 minutes', '10 минут' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Prismatic Wall')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shapechange', 9, 'Transmutation', 'Transform into a powerful creature you have seen.', '1 action', 'Self', 'V, S, M', 'a jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, worn on the head', 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Shapechange', 'Смена облика', 'Transform into a powerful creature you have seen.', 'Превращаетесь в могущественное существо, которое видели.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Self', 'На себя', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, worn on the head', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Shapechange')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Storm of Vengeance', 9, 'Conjuration', 'A massive storm batters an area with successive damaging effects.', '1 action', 'Sight', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Druid'))::text, NULL, 'Storm of Vengeance', 'Буря возмездия', 'A massive storm batters an area with successive damaging effects.', 'Огромная буря обрушивает на область череду разрушительных эффектов.', '1 action', '1 действие', 'Sight', 'В пределах видимости', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Storm of Vengeance')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'True Polymorph', 9, 'Transmutation', 'Permanently transform a creature or object into another (WIS save).', '1 action', '30 feet', 'V, S, M', 'a drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke', 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Bard', 'Warlock', 'Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'True Polymorph', 'Истинное превращение', 'Permanently transform a creature or object into another (WIS save).', 'Навсегда превращаете существо или предмет в другое (спасбросок Мдр).', '1 action', '1 действие', '30 feet', '30 футов', 'V, S, M', 'В, С, М', 'a drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 hour', 'Концентрация, до 1 часа' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'True Polymorph')

INSERT INTO spells (id, name, level, school, description, casting_time, range, components, material, duration, concentration, is_ritual, available_to_class_ids_json, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc, casting_time_engloc, casting_time_rusloc, range_engloc, range_rusloc, components_engloc, components_rusloc, material_engloc, material_rusloc, duration_engloc, duration_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Weird', 9, 'Illusion', 'Manifest nightmares that frighten and deal 4d10 psychic (WIS save).', '1 action', '120 feet', 'V, S', NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', TRUE, FALSE, (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id::text), '[]'::json) FROM character_classes WHERE name IN ('Wizard'))::text, NULL, 'Weird', 'Кошмар', 'Manifest nightmares that frighten and deal 4d10 psychic (WIS save).', 'Воплощаете кошмары, что пугают и наносят 4d10 психическим (спасбросок Мдр).', '1 action', '1 действие', '120 feet', '120 футов', 'V, S', 'В, С', NULL, NULL, 'Concentration, up to 1 minute', 'Концентрация, до 1 минуты' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spells WHERE name = 'Weird')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO skill_effects (id, skill_id, buff_debuff_id, effect_role, chance_percent) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Rage'), (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Raging'), 'BUFF', 100 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skill_effects WHERE skill_id = (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Rage') AND buff_debuff_id = (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Raging'))

INSERT INTO skill_effects (id, skill_id, buff_debuff_id, effect_role, chance_percent) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration'), (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration'), 'BUFF', 100 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM skill_effects WHERE skill_id = (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration') AND buff_debuff_id = (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Bardic Inspiration'))

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+1 Weapon', '+1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, '+1 Weapon', 'Оружие +1', '+1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', '+1 к броскам атаки и урона этим оружием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = '+1 Weapon')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+2 Weapon', '+2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, '+2 Weapon', 'Оружие +2', '+2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', '+2 к броскам атаки и урона этим оружием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = '+2 Weapon')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+3 Weapon', '+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, '+3 Weapon', 'Оружие +3', '+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.', '+3 к броскам атаки и урона этим оружием.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = '+3 Weapon')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+1 Armor', '+1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, '+1 Armor', 'Доспех +1', '+1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.', '+1 к КД, пока надет этот доспех.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = '+1 Armor')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), '+2 Armor', '+2 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.', NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, '+2 Armor', 'Доспех +2', '+2 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.', '+2 к КД, пока надет этот доспех.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = '+2 Armor')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Flaming', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 fire damage.', '1d6', 0, 'FIRE', NULL, 'Flaming', 'Пламенеющее', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 fire damage.', 'При попадании наносит доп. 1d6 урона огнём.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = 'Flaming')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Frost', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 cold damage.', '1d6', 0, 'COLD', NULL, 'Frost', 'Морозное', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 cold damage.', 'При попадании наносит доп. 1d6 урона холодом.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = 'Frost')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Shock', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 lightning damage.', '1d6', 0, 'LIGHTNING', NULL, 'Shock', 'Электрическое', 'On a hit, deal an extra 1d6 lightning damage.', 'При попадании наносит доп. 1d6 урона электричеством.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = 'Shock')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Vicious', 'On a roll of 20 to hit, the weapon deals an extra 7 damage of its type.', '2d6', 0, NULL, NULL, 'Vicious', 'Жестокое', 'On a roll of 20 to hit, the weapon deals an extra 7 damage of its type.', 'При выпадении 20 на попадание оружие наносит доп. 7 урона своего типа.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = 'Vicious')

INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Protection', '+1 bonus to AC and saving throws while worn (e.g. Ring of Protection).', NULL, 0, NULL, (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = '+1 AC and Saves'), 'Protection', 'Защита', '+1 bonus to AC and saving throws while worn (e.g. Ring of Protection).', '+1 к КД и спасброскам, пока надето (напр. Кольцо защиты).' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enchantment_types WHERE name = 'Protection')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Potion of Healing', 'Drink to regain 2d4 + 2 hit points.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Potion'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Drink Healing Potion'), 'ACTIVE', NULL, 'Potion of Healing', 'Зелье лечения', 'Drink to regain 2d4 + 2 hit points.', 'Выпейте, чтобы восстановить 2d4 + 2 хита.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Potion of Healing')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Greater Potion of Healing', 'Drink to regain 4d4 + 4 hit points.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Potion'), 'UNCOMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, (SELECT id FROM skills WHERE name = 'Drink Healing Potion'), 'ACTIVE', NULL, 'Greater Potion of Healing', 'Большое зелье лечения', 'Drink to regain 4d4 + 4 hit points.', 'Выпейте, чтобы восстановить 4d4 + 4 хита.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Greater Potion of Healing')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Torch', 'Burns for 1 hour, casting bright light in a 20-ft radius.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', '1', 0, 'FIRE', TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Torch', 'Факел', 'Burns for 1 hour, casting bright light in a 20-ft radius.', 'Горит 1 час, давая яркий свет в радиусе 20 футов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Torch')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Rope, Hempen (50 feet)', 'Sturdy rope; can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Rope, Hempen (50 feet)', 'Пеньковая верёвка (50 футов)', 'Sturdy rope; can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.', 'Прочная верёвка; рвётся при проверке Силы Сл 17.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Rope, Hempen (50 feet)')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Rations (1 day)', 'Dry food suitable for travel.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Rations (1 day)', 'Рацион (1 день)', 'Dry food suitable for travel.', 'Сухая пища, пригодная для путешествий.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Rations (1 day)')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ring of Protection', '+1 bonus to AC and all saving throws while worn. Requires attunement.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'RARE', NULL, 0, NULL, FALSE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Ring of Protection', 'Кольцо защиты', '+1 bonus to AC and all saving throws while worn. Requires attunement.', '+1 к КД и всем спасброскам, пока надето. Требует настройки.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Ring of Protection')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Abacus', 'A counting frame for quick arithmetic.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, FALSE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Abacus', 'Счёты', 'A counting frame for quick arithmetic.', 'Счётная рамка для быстрых вычислений.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Abacus')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Acid (vial)', 'Thrown weapon: on a hit, deal 2d6 acid damage.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', '2d6', 0, 'ACID', TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Acid (vial)', 'Кислота (склянка)', 'Thrown weapon: on a hit, deal 2d6 acid damage.', 'Метательное оружие: при попадании 2d6 урона кислотой.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Acid (vial)')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Alchemist''s Fire (flask)', 'Thrown weapon: 1d4 fire on a hit, repeating until extinguished.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', '1d4', 0, 'FIRE', TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Alchemist''s Fire (flask)', 'Алхимический огонь (фляга)', 'Thrown weapon: 1d4 fire on a hit, repeating until extinguished.', 'Метательное оружие: 1d4 огнём при попадании, повторяется, пока не потушат.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Alchemist''s Fire (flask)')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Antitoxin (vial)', 'Drink for advantage on saving throws against poison for 1 hour.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Antitoxin (vial)', 'Антитоксин (склянка)', 'Drink for advantage on saving throws against poison for 1 hour.', 'Выпейте ради преимущества на спасброски против яда на 1 час.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Antitoxin (vial)')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Backpack', 'Holds gear; roughly 1 cubic foot or 30 pounds.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, FALSE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Backpack', 'Рюкзак', 'Holds gear; roughly 1 cubic foot or 30 pounds.', 'Вмещает снаряжение; около 1 кубического фута или 30 фунтов.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Backpack')

INSERT INTO item_templates (id, name, description, item_type_id, rarity, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, is_stackable, skill_id, skill_activation, homebrew_id, name_engloc, name_rusloc, description_engloc, description_rusloc) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), 'Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)', 'Spill to cover a 10-ft square; DEX save or fall prone.', (SELECT id FROM item_types WHERE name = 'Adventuring Gear'), 'COMMON', NULL, 0, NULL, TRUE, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)', 'Шарики (мешочек 1000 шт.)', 'Spill to cover a 10-ft square; DEX save or fall prone.', 'Рассыпьте на квадрат 10 футов; спасбросок Лов или падение ничком.' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)')

changeSet.author: phb-seed
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO item_template_buffs (id, template_id, buff_debuff_id) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), (SELECT id FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Ring of Protection'), (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = '+1 AC and Saves') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_template_buffs WHERE template_id = (SELECT id FROM item_templates WHERE name = 'Ring of Protection') AND buff_debuff_id = (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = '+1 AC and Saves'))
